authors_text: Jiaxiang Ren,Kicheon Park,Yingtian Pan,Haibin Ling
title: Self-Supervised Bulk Motion Artifact Removal in Optical Coherence Tomography Angiography
title_zh: 光学相干断层扫描血管造影中自监督体运动伪影去除
abstract: Optical coherence tomography angiography (OCTA) is an important imaging modality in many bioengineering tasks. The image quality of OCTA, however, is often degraded by Bulk Motion Artifacts (BMA), which are due to micromotion of subjects and typically appear as bright stripes surrounded by blurred areas. State-of-the-art methods usually treat BMA removal as a learning-based image inpainting problem, but require numerous training samples with nontrivial annotation. In addition, these methods discard the rich structural and appearance information carried in the BMA stripe region. To address these issues, in this paper we propose a self-supervised content-aware BMA removal model. First, the gradient-based structural information and appearance feature are extracted from the BMA area and injected into the model to capture more connectivity. Second, with easily collected defective masks, the model is trained in a self-supervised manner, in which only the clear areas are used for training while the BMA areas for inference. With the structural information and appearance feature from noisy image as references, our model can remove larger BMA and produce better visualizing result. In addition, only 2D images with defective masks are involved, hence improving the efficiency of our method. Experiments on OCTA of mouse cortex demonstrate that our model can remove most BMA with extremely large sizes and inconsistent intensities while previous methods fail.
summary: Optical coherence tomography angiography (OCTA) is an important imaging modality in many bioengineering tasks. The image quality of OCTA, however, is often degraded by Bulk Motion Artifacts (BMA), which are due to micromotion of subjects and typically appear as bright stripes surrounded by blurred areas. State-of-the-art methods usually treat BMA removal as a learning-based image inpainting problem, but require numerous training samples with nontrivial annotation. In addition, these methods discard the rich structural and appearance information carried in the BMA stripe region. To address these issues, in this paper we propose a self-supervised content-aware BMA removal model. First, the gradient-based structural information and appearance feature are extracted from the BMA area and injected into the model to capture more connectivity. Second, with easily collected defective masks, the model is trained in a self-supervised manner, in which only the clear areas are used for training while the BMA areas for inference. With the structural information and appearance feature from noisy image as references, our model can remove larger BMA and produce better visualizing result. In addition, only 2D images with defective masks are involved, hence improving the efficiency of our method. Experiments on OCTA of mouse cortex demonstrate that our model can remove most BMA with extremely large sizes and inconsistent intensities while previous methods fail.
abstract_zh: 光学相干断层扫描血管造影（OCTA）是许多生物工程任务中的重要成像方式。然而，OCTA 的图像质量通常会因主体运动伪影 (BMA) 而降低，这是由于拍摄对象的微运动造成的，通常表现为被模糊区域包围的明亮条纹。最先进的方法通常将 BMA 去除视为基于学习的图像修复问题，但需要大量具有重要注释的训练样本。此外，这些方法丢弃了 BMA 条纹区域中携带的丰富的结构和外观信息。为了解决这些问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种自我监督的内容感知 BMA 删除模型。首先，从 BMA 区域提取基于梯度的结构信息和外观特征并将其注入到模型中以捕获更多连接性。其次，利用容易收集的有缺陷的掩模，以自监督的方式训练模型，其中仅使用清晰区域进行训练，而BMA区域进行推理。以噪声图像的结构信息和外观特征为参考，我们的模型可以去除较大的 BMA 并产生更好的可视化结果。此外，仅涉及具有缺陷掩模的2D图像，因此提高了我们方法的效率。对小鼠皮层 OCTA 的实验表明，我们的模型可以去除大多数尺寸极大且强度不一致的 BMA，而之前的方法则失败了。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督的、内容感知的光学相干断层扫描血管造影（OCTA）大体积运动伪影（BMA）去除模型。
AI.motivation: 现有BMA去除方法依赖大量标注样本且忽略BMA区域的结构和外观信息，导致去除效果受限。
AI.method: 提取BMA区域的梯度结构信息和外观特征并注入模型，结合缺陷掩码进行自监督训练，仅利用清晰区域训练、BMA区域用于推理。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型能有效去除大尺寸且强度不一致的BMA，而传统方法在此场景下失效。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过利用BMA区域信息和自监督训练，显著提升了BMA去除效率与可视化效果。

With the structural information and appearance feature from noisy image as references, our model can remove larger BMA and produce better visualizing result. In addition, only 2D images with defective masks are involved, hence improving the efficiency of our method. Experiments on OCTA of mouse cortex demonstrate that our model can remove most BMA with extremely large sizes and inconsistent intensities while previous methods fail. 光学相干断层扫描血管造影（OCTA）是许多生物工程任务中的重要成像方式。然而，OCTA 的图像质量通常会因主体运动伪影 (BMA) 而降低，这是由于拍摄对象的微运动造成的，通常表现为被模糊区域包围的明亮条纹。最先进的方法通常将 BMA 去除视为基于学习的图像修复问题，但需要大量具有重要注释的训练样本。此外，这些方法丢弃了 BMA 条纹区域中携带的丰富的结构和外观信息。为了解决这些问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种自我监督的内容感知 BMA 删除模型。首先，从 BMA 区域提取基于梯度的结构信息和外观特征并将其注入到模型中以捕获更多连接性。其次，利用容易收集的有缺陷的掩模，以自监督的方式训练模型，其中仅使用清晰区域进行训练，而BMA区域进行推理。以噪声图像的结构信息和外观特征为参考，我们的模型可以去除较大的 BMA 并产生更好的可视化结果。此外，仅涉及具有缺陷掩模的2D图像，因此提高了我们方法的效率。对小鼠皮层 OCTA 的实验表明，我们的模型可以去除大多数尺寸极大且强度不一致的 BMA，而之前的方法则失败了。 本文提出一种自监督的、内容感知的光学相干断层扫描血管造影（OCTA）大体积运动伪影（BMA）去除模型。 Jiaxiang Ren,Kicheon Park,Yingtian Pan,Haibin Ling cs.CV

authors_text: Leonard Bruns,Patric Jensfelt
title: On the Evaluation of RGB-D-based Categorical Pose and Shape Estimation
title_zh: 基于RGB-D的分类姿态和形状估计的评估
abstract: Recently, various methods for 6D pose and shape estimation of objects have been proposed. Typically, these methods evaluate their pose estimation in terms of average precision, and reconstruction quality with chamfer distance. In this work we take a critical look at this predominant evaluation protocol including metrics and datasets. We propose a new set of metrics, contribute new annotations for the Redwood dataset and evaluate state-of-the-art methods in a fair comparison. We find that existing methods do not generalize well to unconstrained orientations, and are actually heavily biased towards objects being upright. We contribute an easy-to-use evaluation toolbox with well-defined metrics, method and dataset interfaces, which readily allows evaluation and comparison with various state-of-the-art approaches (see https://github.com/roym899/pose_and_shape_evaluation ).
summary: Recently, various methods for 6D pose and shape estimation of objects have been proposed. Typically, these methods evaluate their pose estimation in terms of average precision, and reconstruction quality with chamfer distance. In this work we take a critical look at this predominant evaluation protocol including metrics and datasets. We propose a new set of metrics, contribute new annotations for the Redwood dataset and evaluate state-of-the-art methods in a fair comparison. We find that existing methods do not generalize well to unconstrained orientations, and are actually heavily biased towards objects being upright. We contribute an easy-to-use evaluation toolbox with well-defined metrics, method and dataset interfaces, which readily allows evaluation and comparison with various state-of-the-art approaches (see https://github.com/roym899/pose_and_shape_evaluation ).
abstract_zh: 最近，已经提出了各种用于物体 6D 姿态和形状估计的方法。通常，这些方法根据平均精度和倒角距离的重建质量来评估其姿态估计。在这项工作中，我们对这个主要的评估协议（包括指标和数据集）进行了批判性的审视。我们提出了一组新的指标，为 Redwood 数据集提供新的注释，并在公平的比较中评估最先进的方法。我们发现现有的方法不能很好地推广到无约束的方向，并且实际上严重偏向于直立的物体。我们提供了一个易于使用的评估工具箱，具有明确定义的指标、方法和数据集接口，可以轻松地与各种最先进的方法进行评估和比较（请参阅https://github.com/roym899/pose_and_shape_evaluation）。

AI.tldr: 本文针对基于RGB-D的物体类别姿态和形状估计任务，提出新的评估指标并改进数据集注释，揭示现有方法在非约束方向上的泛化不足。
AI.motivation: 现有评估协议存在偏差，过度依赖平均精度和卡方距离，导致方法在非 upright 方向表现被低估，缺乏对实际场景适应性的全面评估。
AI.method: 设计新评估指标，为Redwood数据集添加关键点注释，构建标准化评估工具箱，对前沿方法进行公平对比实验。
AI.result: 发现现有方法对非 upright 物体存在显著性能下降，验证了评估指标与数据集注释对模型泛化能力的关键影响。
AI.conclusion: 提出开源评估框架，推动更严谨的6D姿态与形状估计方法研究，强调评估协议设计对模型发展的重要指导作用。

authors_text: Quanyi Li,Zhenghao Peng,Bolei Zhou
title: Efficient Learning of Safe Driving Policy via Human-AI Copilot Optimization
title_zh: 通过人机人工智能副驾驶优化高效学习安全驾驶政策
comment: Quanyi Li and Zhenghao Peng contribute equally to this work
comments: Quanyi Li and Zhenghao Peng contribute equally to this work
abstract: Human intervention is an effective way to inject human knowledge into the training loop of reinforcement learning, which can bring fast learning and ensured training safety. Given the very limited budget of human intervention, it remains challenging to design when and how human expert interacts with the learning agent in the training. In this work, we develop a novel human-in-the-loop learning method called Human-AI Copilot Optimization (HACO).To allow the agent's sufficient exploration in the risky environments while ensuring the training safety, the human expert can take over the control and demonstrate how to avoid probably dangerous situations or trivial behaviors. The proposed HACO then effectively utilizes the data both from the trial-and-error exploration and human's partial demonstration to train a high-performing agent. HACO extracts proxy state-action values from partial human demonstration and optimizes the agent to improve the proxy values meanwhile reduce the human interventions. The experiments show that HACO achieves a substantially high sample efficiency in the safe driving benchmark. HACO can train agents to drive in unseen traffic scenarios with a handful of human intervention budget and achieve high safety and generalizability, outperforming both reinforcement learning and imitation learning baselines with a large margin. Code and demo videos are available at: https://decisionforce.github.io/HACO/.
summary: Human intervention is an effective way to inject human knowledge into the training loop of reinforcement learning, which can bring fast learning and ensured training safety. Given the very limited budget of human intervention, it remains challenging to design when and how human expert interacts with the learning agent in the training. In this work, we develop a novel human-in-the-loop learning method called Human-AI Copilot Optimization (HACO).To allow the agent's sufficient exploration in the risky environments while ensuring the training safety, the human expert can take over the control and demonstrate how to avoid probably dangerous situations or trivial behaviors. The proposed HACO then effectively utilizes the data both from the trial-and-error exploration and human's partial demonstration to train a high-performing agent. HACO extracts proxy state-action values from partial human demonstration and optimizes the agent to improve the proxy values meanwhile reduce the human interventions. The experiments show that HACO achieves a substantially high sample efficiency in the safe driving benchmark. HACO can train agents to drive in unseen traffic scenarios with a handful of human intervention budget and achieve high safety and generalizability, outperforming both reinforcement learning and imitation learning baselines with a large margin. Code and demo videos are available at: https://decisionforce.github.io/HACO/.
abstract_zh: 人为干预是将人类知识注入强化学习训练循环的有效方式，可以带来快速学习并保证训练安全。鉴于人类干预的预算非常有限，设计人类专家在训练中何时以及如何与学习代理交互仍然具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种新颖的人机循环学习方法，称为人机智能副驾驶优化（HACO）。为了让智能体在危险环境中进行充分探索，同时确保训练安全，人类专家可以接管控制并演示如何避免可能的危险情况或琐碎行为。然后，所提出的 HACO 有效地利用来自试错探索和人类部分演示的数据来训练高性能智能体。 HACO从部分人类演示中提取代理状态动作值并优化代理以提高代理值同时减少人为干预。实验表明，HACO在安全驾驶基准测试中取得了相当高的样本效率。 HACO 可以训练智能体以少量的人工干预预算在看不见的交通场景中驾驶，并实现高安全性和通用性，大幅优于强化学习和模仿学习基线。代码和演示视频位于：https://decisionforce.github.io/HACO/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为HACO的人机协同优化方法，旨在通过有限的人类干预高效学习安全驾驶策略。
AI.motivation: 在强化学习中，人类干预虽能提升学习效率和安全性，但受限于预算，如何高效设计人机交互时机与方式仍是挑战。
AI.method: HACO结合试错探索数据与人类部分示范，提取代理状态-动作值并优化策略，在减少人类干预的同时提升代理性能。
AI.result: HACO在安全驾驶基准测试中表现出显著的样本效率，以少量人类干预即可训练出高安全性和泛化能力的代理，优于传统强化学习和模仿学习基线。
AI.conclusion: HACO通过有效整合人机协同数据，实现了在复杂交通场景中安全、高效的学习，为现实应用提供了可行方案。

Given the very limited budget of human intervention, it remains challenging to design when and how human expert interacts with the learning agent in the training. The experiments show that HACO achieves a substantially high sample efficiency in the safe driving benchmark. HACO can train agents to drive in unseen traffic scenarios with a handful of human intervention budget and achieve high safety and generalizability, outperforming both reinforcement learning and imitation learning baselines with a large margin. authors_text: Xiangjie Kong,Kailai Wang,Mingliang Hou,Feng Xia,Gour Karmakar,Jianxin Li
title: Exploring Human Mobility for Multi-Pattern Passenger Prediction: A Graph Learning Framework
title_zh: 探索人类流动性以进行多模式乘客预测：图学习框架
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems, 2022
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems, 2022
abstract: Traffic flow prediction is an integral part of an intelligent transportation system and thus fundamental for various traffic-related applications. Buses are an indispensable way of moving for urban residents with fixed routes and schedules, which leads to latent travel regularity. However, human mobility patterns, specifically the complex relationships between bus passengers, are deeply hidden in this fixed mobility mode. Although many models exist to predict traffic flow, human mobility patterns have not been well explored in this regard. To reduce this research gap and learn human mobility knowledge from this fixed travel behaviors, we propose a multi-pattern passenger flow prediction framework, MPGCN, based on Graph Convolutional Network (GCN). Firstly, we construct a novel sharing-stop network to model relationships between passengers based on bus record data. Then, we employ GCN to extract features from the graph by learning useful topology information and introduce a deep clustering method to recognize mobility patterns hidden in bus passengers. Furthermore, to fully utilize Spatio-temporal information, we propose GCN2Flow to predict passenger flow based on various mobility patterns. To the best of our knowledge, this paper is the first work to adopt a multipattern approach to predict the bus passenger flow from graph learning. We design a case study for optimizing routes. Extensive experiments upon a real-world bus dataset demonstrate that MPGCN has potential efficacy in passenger flow prediction and route optimization.

To reduce this research gap and learn human mobility knowledge from this fixed travel behaviors, we propose a multi-pattern passenger flow prediction framework, MPGCN, based on Graph Convolutional Network (GCN). Firstly, we construct a novel sharing-stop network to model relationships between passengers based on bus record data. Then, we employ GCN to extract features from the graph by learning useful topology information and introduce a deep clustering method to recognize mobility patterns hidden in bus passengers. Furthermore, to fully utilize Spatio-temporal information, we propose GCN2Flow to predict passenger flow based on various mobility patterns. To the best of our knowledge, this paper is the first work to adopt a multipattern approach to predict the bus passenger flow from graph learning. We design a case study for optimizing routes. Extensive experiments upon a real-world bus dataset demonstrate that MPGCN has potential efficacy in passenger flow prediction and route optimization.
abstract_zh: 交通流预测是智能交通系统的组成部分，因此是各种交通相关应用的基础。公交车是城市居民不可或缺的出行方式，其线路和班次固定，具有潜在的出行规律性。然而，人类的流动模式，特别是公交车乘客之间复杂的关系，却深深地隐藏在这种固定的流动模式中。尽管存在许多模型来预测交通流量，但人类流动模式在这方面尚未得到很好的探索。为了缩小这一研究差距并从这种固定的出行行为中学习人类出行知识，我们提出了一种基于图卷积网络（GCN）的多模式客流预测框架 MPGCN。首先，我们构建了一个新颖的共享停靠网络，以基于公交车记录数据对乘客之间的关系进行建模。然后，我们使用 GCN 通过学习有用的拓扑信息从图中提取特征，并引入深度聚类方法来识别隐藏在公交车乘客中的移动模式。此外，为了充分利用时空信息，我们提出 GCN2Flow 根据各种移动模式来预测客流。据我们所知，本文是第一篇采用多模式方法通过图学习来预测公交车客流的工作。我们设计了一个优化路线的案例研究。对真实公交车数据集的大量实验表明，MPGCN 在客流预测和路线优化方面具有潜在功效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于图学习的多模式乘客流量预测框架MPGCN，用于优化公交路线和预测乘客流量。
AI.motivation: 现有交通流量预测模型未充分挖掘固定公交路线中乘客的复杂移动模式，导致研究存在空白。
AI.method: 构建共享站点网络建模乘客关系，结合图卷积网络（GCN）提取拓扑特征，并引入深度聚类识别移动模式，最终通过GCN2Flow实现时空信息驱动的流量预测。
AI.result: 在真实公交数据集上的实验表明，MPGCN在乘客流量预测和路线优化中表现出潜力。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次将多模式图学习应用于公交客流预测，验证了框架的有效性和创新性。

search_text: Exploring Human Mobility for Multi-Pattern Passenger Prediction: A Graph Learning Framework 探索人类流动性以进行多模式乘客预测：图学习框架 Traffic flow prediction is an integral part of an intelligent transportation system and thus fundamental for various traffic-related applications. Buses are an indispensable way of moving for urban residents with fixed routes and schedules, which leads to latent travel regularity. However, human mobility patterns, specifically the complex relationships between bus passengers, are deeply hidden in this fixed mobility mode. Although many models exist to predict traffic flow, human mobility patterns have not been well explored in this regard. To reduce this research gap and learn human mobility knowledge from this fixed travel behaviors, we propose a multi-pattern passenger flow prediction framework, MPGCN, based on Graph Convolutional Network (GCN). Firstly, we construct a novel sharing-stop network to model relationships between passengers based on bus record data. Then, we employ GCN to extract features from the graph by learning useful topology information and introduce a deep clustering method to recognize mobility patterns hidden in bus passengers. Furthermore, to fully utilize Spatio-temporal information, we propose GCN2Flow to predict passenger flow based on various mobility patterns. To the best of our knowledge, this paper is the first work to adopt a multipattern approach to predict the bus passenger flow from graph learning. We design a case study for optimizing routes. Extensive experiments upon a real-world bus dataset demonstrate that MPGCN has potential efficacy in passenger flow prediction and route optimization. 交通流预测是智能交通系统的组成部分，因此是各种交通相关应用的基础。公交车是城市居民不可或缺的出行方式，其线路和班次固定，具有潜在的出行规律性。然而，人类的流动模式，特别是公交车乘客之间复杂的关系，却深深地隐藏在这种固定的流动模式中。尽管存在许多模型来预测交通流量，但人类流动模式在这方面尚未得到很好的探索。为了缩小这一研究差距并从这种固定的出行行为中学习人类出行知识，我们提出了一种基于图卷积网络（GCN）的多模式客流预测框架 MPGCN。首先，我们构建了一个新颖的共享停靠网络，以基于公交车记录数据对乘客之间的关系进行建模。然后，我们使用 GCN 通过学习有用的拓扑信息从图中提取特征，并引入深度聚类方法来识别隐藏在公交车乘客中的移动模式。此外，为了充分利用时空信息，我们提出 GCN2Flow 根据各种移动模式来预测客流。据我们所知，本文是第一篇采用多模式方法通过图学习来预测公交车客流的工作。我们设计了一个优化路线的案例研究。对真实公交车数据集的大量实验表明，MPGCN 在客流预测和路线优化方面具有潜在功效。 本文提出基于图学习的多模式乘客流量预测框架MPGCN，用于优化公交路线和预测乘客流量。 Xiangjie Kong,Kailai Wang,Mingliang Hou,Feng Xia,Gour Karmakar,Jianxin Li cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yuntian Chen,Dongxiao Zhang
title: Integration of knowledge and data in machine learning
title_zh: 机器学习中知识和数据的整合
comment: The language has been modified and figures are updated
comments: The language has been modified and figures are updated
abstract: Scientific research's mandate is to comprehend and explore the world, as well as to improve it based on experience and knowledge. Knowledge embedding and knowledge discovery are two significant methods of integrating knowledge and data. Through knowledge embedding, the barriers between knowledge and data can be eliminated, and machine learning models with physical common sense can be established. Meanwhile, humans' understanding of the world is always limited, and knowledge discovery takes advantage of machine learning to extract new knowledge from observations. Knowledge discovery can not only assist researchers to better grasp the nature of physics, but it can also support them in conducting knowledge embedding research. A closed loop of knowledge generation and usage are formed by combining knowledge embedding with knowledge discovery, which can improve the robustness and accuracy of models and uncover previously unknown scientific principles. This study summarizes and analyzes extant literature, as well as identifies research gaps and future opportunities.

Knowledge discovery can not only assist researchers to better grasp the nature of physics, but it can also support them in conducting knowledge embedding research. A closed loop of knowledge generation and usage are formed by combining knowledge embedding with knowledge discovery, which can improve the robustness and accuracy of models and uncover previously unknown scientific principles. This study summarizes and analyzes extant literature, as well as identifies research gaps and future opportunities.
abstract_zh: 科学研究的任务是理解和探索世界，并根据经验和知识来改进世界。知识嵌入和知识发现是整合知识和数据的两种重要方法。通过知识嵌入，可以消除知识和数据之间的障碍，建立具有物理常识的机器学习模型。同时，人类对世界的理解始终是有限的，知识发现利用机器学习从观察中提取新知识。知识发现不仅可以帮助研究人员更好地掌握物理学的本质，还可以支持他们进行知识嵌入研究。将知识嵌入与知识发现相结合，形成知识生成和使用的闭环，可以提高模型的鲁棒性和准确性，揭示以前未知的科学原理。本研究总结和分析了现有文献，并确定了研究差距和未来机会。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了机器学习中知识与数据整合的两种方法——知识嵌入与知识发现，并分析其协同效应。
AI.motivation: 科学探索需结合经验与知识，但现有方法存在知识与数据割裂、模型缺乏常识性理解等局限。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析知识嵌入（消除知识数据壁垒）与知识发现（从数据中提取新知识）的协同机制。
AI.result: 构建了知识生成-应用闭环，提升模型鲁棒性与准确性，揭示新科学原理，并识别出跨学科应用等研究空白。
AI.conclusion: 知识数据化与数据知识化的双向融合是推动科学发现与AI可信发展的关键方向。

authors_text: Thien Huynh-The,Quoc-Viet Pham,Xuan-Qui Pham,Thanh Thi Nguyen,Zhu Han,Dong-Seong Kim
title: Artificial Intelligence for the Metaverse: A Survey
title_zh: 虚拟世界的人工智能：一项调查
abstract: Along with the massive growth of the Internet from the 1990s until now, various innovative technologies have been created to bring users breathtaking experiences with more virtual interactions in cyberspace. Many virtual environments with thousands of services and applications, from social networks to virtual gaming worlds, have been developed with immersive experience and digital transformation, but most are incoherent instead of being integrated into a platform. In this context, metaverse, a term formed by combining meta and universe, has been introduced as a shared virtual world that is fueled by many emerging technologies, such as fifth-generation networks and beyond, virtual reality, and artificial intelligence (AI). Among such technologies, AI has shown the great importance of processing big data to enhance immersive experience and enable human-like intelligence of virtual agents. In this survey, we make a beneficial effort to explore the role of AI in the foundation and development of the metaverse. We first deliver a preliminary of AI, including machine learning algorithms and deep learning architectures, and its role in the metaverse. We then convey a comprehensive investigation of AI-based methods concerning six technical aspects that have potentials for the metaverse: natural language processing, machine vision, blockchain, networking, digital twin, and neural interface, and being potential for the metaverse. Subsequently, several AI-aided applications, such as healthcare, manufacturing, smart cities, and gaming, are studied to be deployed in the virtual worlds. Finally, we conclude the key contribution of this survey and open some future research directions in AI for the metaverse.
summary: Along with the massive growth of the Internet from the 1990s until now, various innovative technologies have been created to bring users breathtaking experiences with more virtual interactions in cyberspace. Many virtual environments with thousands of services and applications, from social networks to virtual gaming worlds, have been developed with immersive experience and digital transformation, but most are incoherent instead of being integrated into a platform. In this context, metaverse, a term formed by combining meta and universe, has been introduced as a shared virtual world that is fueled by many emerging technologies, such as fifth-generation networks and beyond, virtual reality, and artificial intelligence (AI). Among such technologies, AI has shown the great importance of processing big data to enhance immersive experience and enable human-like intelligence of virtual agents. In this survey, we make a beneficial effort to explore the role of AI in the foundation and development of the metaverse. We first deliver a preliminary of AI, including machine learning algorithms and deep learning architectures, and its role in the metaverse. We then convey a comprehensive investigation of AI-based methods concerning six technical aspects that have potentials for the metaverse: natural language processing, machine vision, blockchain, networking, digital twin, and neural interface, and being potential for the metaverse. Subsequently, several AI-aided applications, such as healthcare, manufacturing, smart cities, and gaming, are studied to be deployed in the virtual worlds. Finally, we conclude the key contribution of this survey and open some future research directions in AI for the metaverse.
abstract_zh: 从 20 世纪 90 年代至今，随着互联网的大规模发展，各种创新技术不断涌现，通过网络空间中更多的虚拟交互为用户带来令人惊叹的体验。许多虚拟环境拥有数千种服务和应用程序，从社交网络到虚拟游戏世界，都是通过沉浸式体验和数字化转型来开发的，但大多数都是不连贯的，而不是集成到一个平台中。在这种背景下，“元宇宙”（Metaverse）这个由“元”和“宇宙”组合而成的术语被引入，作为一个由许多新兴技术推动的共享虚拟世界，例如第五代网络及更高技术、虚拟现实和人工智能（AI）。在这些技术中，人工智能已经显示出处理大数据对于增强沉浸式体验并实现虚拟代理的类人智能的重要性。在本次调查中，我们为探讨人工智能在虚拟宇宙的基础和发展中的作用做出了有益的努力。我们首先提供人工智能的初步介绍，包括机器学习算法和深度学习架构，及其在元宇宙中的作用。然后，我们对基于人工智能的方法进行了全面的研究，涉及六个具有元宇宙潜力的技术方面：自然语言处理、机器视觉、区块链、网络、数字孪生和神经接口，以及元宇宙潜力。随后，研究人员研究了在虚拟世界中部署一些人工智能辅助应用程序，例如医疗保健、制造、智能城市和游戏。最后，我们总结了本次调查的关键贡献，并为元宇宙开启了人工智能未来的一些研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了人工智能在元宇宙基础建设与发展中的关键作用，探讨了AI技术在多个技术领域和应用场景中的潜力。
AI.motivation: 随着虚拟环境的多样化发展，现有平台缺乏整合性，元宇宙作为集成化虚拟世界需依赖AI等技术实现沉浸式体验与智能化交互。
AI.method: 通过系统梳理AI技术（如机器学习、深度学习）及其在自然语言处理、视觉计算、区块链等六个技术方向的应用，并分析其在医疗、制造等场景的落地可能性。
AI.result: 明确了AI在元宇宙中的核心贡献，包括数据处理、虚拟代理智能化及跨领域技术融合，并提出了未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 人工智能是构建元宇宙的关键驱动力，需进一步探索技术协同与实际应用的深度融合路径。

search_text: Artificial Intelligence for the Metaverse: A Survey 虚拟世界的人工智能：一项调查 Along with the massive growth of the Internet from the 1990s until now, various innovative technologies have been created to bring users breathtaking experiences with more virtual interactions in cyberspace. Many virtual environments with thousands of services and applications, from social networks to virtual gaming worlds, have been developed with immersive experience and digital transformation, but most are incoherent instead of being integrated into a platform. In this context, metaverse, a term formed by combining meta and universe, has been introduced as a shared virtual world that is fueled by many emerging technologies, such as fifth-generation networks and beyond, virtual reality, and artificial intelligence (AI). Among such technologies, AI has shown the great importance of processing big data to enhance immersive experience and enable human-like intelligence of virtual agents. In this survey, we make a beneficial effort to explore the role of AI in the foundation and development of the metaverse. We first deliver a preliminary of AI, including machine learning algorithms and deep learning architectures, and its role in the metaverse. We then convey a comprehensive investigation of AI-based methods concerning six technical aspects that have potentials for the metaverse: natural language processing, machine vision, blockchain, networking, digital twin, and neural interface, and being potential for the metaverse. Subsequently, several AI-aided applications, such as healthcare, manufacturing, smart cities, and gaming, are studied to be deployed in the virtual worlds. Finally, we conclude the key contribution of this survey and open some future research directions in AI for the metaverse. 从 20 世纪 90 年代至今，随着互联网的大规模发展，各种创新技术不断涌现，通过网络空间中更多的虚拟交互为用户带来令人惊叹的体验。许多虚拟环境拥有数千种服务和应用程序，从社交网络到虚拟游戏世界，都是通过沉浸式体验和数字化转型来开发的，但大多数都是不连贯的，而不是集成到一个平台中。在这种背景下，“元宇宙”（Metaverse）这个由“元”和“宇宙”组合而成的术语被引入，作为一个由许多新兴技术推动的共享虚拟世界，例如第五代网络及更高技术、虚拟现实和人工智能（AI）。在这些技术中，人工智能已经显示出处理大数据对于增强沉浸式体验并实现虚拟代理的类人智能的重要性。在本次调查中，我们为探讨人工智能在虚拟宇宙的基础和发展中的作用做出了有益的努力。我们首先提供人工智能的初步介绍，包括机器学习算法和深度学习架构，及其在元宇宙中的作用。然后，我们对基于人工智能的方法进行了全面的研究，涉及六个具有元宇宙潜力的技术方面：自然语言处理、机器视觉、区块链、网络、数字孪生和神经接口，以及元宇宙潜力。随后，研究人员研究了在虚拟世界中部署一些人工智能辅助应用程序，例如医疗保健、制造、智能城市和游戏。最后，我们总结了本次调查的关键贡献，并为元宇宙开启了人工智能未来的一些研究方向。 本文综述了人工智能在元宇宙基础建设与发展中的关键作用，探讨了AI技术在多个技术领域和应用场景中的潜力。 Thien Huynh-The,Quoc-Viet Pham,Xuan-Qui Pham,Thanh Thi Nguyen,Zhu Han,Dong-Seong Kim cs.CY,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Andreas Bueff,Ioannis Papantonis,Auste Simkute,Vaishak Belle
title: Explainability in Machine Learning: a Pedagogical Perspective
title_zh: 机器学习的可解释性：教学视角
abstract: Given the importance of integrating of explainability into machine learning, at present, there are a lack of pedagogical resources exploring this. Specifically, we have found a need for resources in explaining how one can teach the advantages of explainability in machine learning. Often pedagogical approaches in the field of machine learning focus on getting students prepared to apply various models in the real world setting, but much less attention is given to teaching students the various techniques one could employ to explain a model's decision-making process. Furthermore, explainability can benefit from a narrative structure that aids one in understanding which techniques are governed by which questions about the data. We provide a pedagogical perspective on how to structure the learning process to better impart knowledge to students and researchers in machine learning, when and how to implement various explainability techniques as well as how to interpret the results. We discuss a system of teaching explainability in machine learning, by exploring the advantages and disadvantages of various opaque and transparent machine learning models, as well as when to utilize specific explainability techniques and the various frameworks used to structure the tools for explainability. Among discussing concrete assignments, we will also discuss ways to structure potential assignments to best help students learn to use explainability as a tool alongside any given machine learning application. Data science professionals completing the course will have a birds-eye view of a rapidly developing area and will be confident to deploy machine learning more widely. A preliminary analysis on the effectiveness of a recently delivered course following the structure presented here is included as evidence supporting our pedagogical approach.

Specifically, we have found a need for resources in explaining how one can teach the advantages of explainability in machine learning. Often pedagogical approaches in the field of machine learning focus on getting students prepared to apply various models in the real world setting, but much less attention is given to teaching students the various techniques one could employ to explain a model's decision-making process. We provide a pedagogical perspective on how to structure the learning process to better impart knowledge to students and researchers in machine learning, when and how to implement various explainability techniques as well as how to interpret the results. We discuss a system of teaching explainability in machine learning, by exploring the advantages and disadvantages of various opaque and transparent machine learning models, as well as when to utilize specific explainability techniques and the various frameworks used to structure the tools for explainability. Among discussing concrete assignments, we will also discuss ways to structure potential assignments to best help students learn to use explainability as a tool alongside any given machine learning application. Data science professionals completing the course will have a birds-eye view of a rapidly developing area and will be confident to deploy machine learning more widely. A preliminary analysis on the effectiveness of a recently delivered course following the structure presented here is included as evidence supporting our pedagogical approach.
abstract_zh: 鉴于将可解释性整合到机器学习中的重要性，目前缺乏探索这一点的教学资源。具体来说，我们发现需要资源来解释如何教授机器学习中可解释性的优势。机器学习领域的教学方法通常侧重于让学生准备好在现实世界环境中应用各种模型，但很少关注教导学生可以用来解释模型决策过程的各种技术。此外，可解释性可以受益于一种叙述结构，该结构有助于人们理解哪些技术是由哪些数据问题控制的。我们提供了关于如何构建学习过程以更好地向学生和研究人员传授机器学习知识、何时以及如何实施各种可解释性技术以及如何解释结果的教学视角。我们通过探索各种不透明和透明机器学习模型的优点和缺点，以及何时利用特定的可解释性技术和用于构建可解释性工具的各种框架，讨论了机器学习中的可解释性教学系统。在讨论具体作业时，我们还将讨论构建潜在作业的方法，以最好地帮助学生学习使用可解释性作为任何给定机器学习应用程序的工具。完成该课程的数据科学专业人士将对快速发展的领域有一个鸟瞰图，并将有信心更广泛地部署机器学习。根据此处介绍的结构对最近提供的课程的有效性进行了初步分析，作为支持我们教学方法的证据。

AI.tldr: 本文从教学角度探讨如何将机器学习可解释性融入课程体系，提出系统化教学框架与实践方法。
AI.motivation: 当前机器学习教育侧重模型应用而忽视可解释性教学，缺乏系统性资源指导学生掌握模型决策解释技术。
AI.method: 通过对比透明/黑箱模型优劣，构建包含技术选择逻辑、结果解读方法的课程体系，并设计针对性教学任务。
AI.result: 开发出结构化课程方案并附带初步教学效果分析，验证了该教学框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该教学方法使数据科学从业者能系统掌握可解释性工具，增强机器学习应用的可信度与广泛部署能力。

authors_text: Davide Poggiali,Diego Cecchin,Stefano De Marchi
title: Reducing the Gibbs effect in multimodal medical imaging by the Fake Nodes Approach
title_zh: 通过假节点方法减少多模态医学成像中的吉布斯效应
abstract: It is a common practice in multimodal medical imaging to undersample the anatomically-derived segmentation images to measure the mean activity of a co-acquired functional image. This practice avoids the resampling-related Gibbs effect that would occur in oversampling the functional image. As sides effect, waste of time and efforts are produced since the anatomical segmentation at full resolution is performed in many hours of computations or manual work. In this work we explain the commonly-used resampling methods and give errors bound in the cases of continuous and discontinuous signals. Then we propose a Fake Nodes scheme for image resampling designed to reduce the Gibbs effect when oversampling the functional image. This new approach is compared to the traditional counterpart in two significant experiments, both showing that Fake Nodes resampling gives smaller errors.
summary: It is a common practice in multimodal medical imaging to undersample the anatomically-derived segmentation images to measure the mean activity of a co-acquired functional image. This practice avoids the resampling-related Gibbs effect that would occur in oversampling the functional image. As sides effect, waste of time and efforts are produced since the anatomical segmentation at full resolution is performed in many hours of computations or manual work. In this work we explain the commonly-used resampling methods and give errors bound in the cases of continuous and discontinuous signals. Then we propose a Fake Nodes scheme for image resampling designed to reduce the Gibbs effect when oversampling the functional image. This new approach is compared to the traditional counterpart in two significant experiments, both showing that Fake Nodes resampling gives smaller errors.
abstract_zh: 多模态医学成像中的常见做法是对解剖学派生的分割图像进行欠采样，以测量共同采集的功能图像的平均活动。这种做法避免了在对功能图像进行过采样时出现的与重采样相关的吉布斯效应。作为副作用，由于全分辨率的解剖分割需要花费许多小时的计算或手动工作来执行，因此产生了时间和精力的浪费。在这项工作中，我们解释了常用的重采样方法，并给出了连续和不连续信号情况下的误差范围。然后，我们提出了一种用于图像重采样的假节点方案，旨在减少对功能图像进行过采样时的吉布斯效应。在两个重要实验中将这种新方法与传统方法进行了比较，这两个实验都表明假节点重采样带来的误差更小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Fake Nodes的图像重采样方法，旨在减少多模态医学影像中功能图像过采样时产生的吉布斯效应。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过欠采样解剖分割图像避免吉布斯效应，但需耗费大量计算资源和人工成本，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 分析传统重采样方法的误差边界，提出基于假节点的重采样方案，并通过实验对比验证其有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，Fake Nodes方法在连续和不连续信号场景下均能显著降低重采样误差。
AI.conclusion: Fake Nodes方法有效缓解了吉布斯效应，在保持精度的同时减少计算资源消耗，优于传统方法。

This new approach is compared to the traditional counterpart in two significant experiments, both showing that Fake Nodes resampling gives smaller errors. 多模态医学成像中的常见做法是对解剖学派生的分割图像进行欠采样，以测量共同采集的功能图像的平均活动。这种做法避免了在对功能图像进行过采样时出现的与重采样相关的吉布斯效应。作为副作用，由于全分辨率的解剖分割需要花费许多小时的计算或手动工作来执行，因此产生了时间和精力的浪费。在这项工作中，我们解释了常用的重采样方法，并给出了连续和不连续信号情况下的误差范围。然后，我们提出了一种用于图像重采样的假节点方案，旨在减少对功能图像进行过采样时的吉布斯效应。在两个重要实验中将这种新方法与传统方法进行了比较，这两个实验都表明假节点重采样带来的误差更小。 本文提出一种名为Fake Nodes的图像重采样方法，旨在减少多模态医学影像中功能图像过采样时产生的吉布斯效应。 Davide Poggiali,Diego Cecchin,Stefano De Marchi math.NA,cs.CV

authors_text: Che Wang,Xufang Luo,Keith Ross,Dongsheng Li
title: VRL3: A Data-Driven Framework for Visual Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: VRL3：视觉深度强化学习的数据驱动框架
comment: 41 pages, camera-ready final version, accepted to NeurIPS 2022
comments: 41 pages, camera-ready final version, accepted to NeurIPS 2022
abstract: We propose VRL3, a powerful data-driven framework with a simple design for solving challenging visual deep reinforcement learning (DRL) tasks. We analyze a number of major obstacles in taking a data-driven approach, and present a suite of design principles, novel findings, and critical insights about data-driven visual DRL. Our framework has three stages: in stage 1, we leverage non-RL datasets (e.g. ImageNet) to learn task-agnostic visual representations; in stage 2, we use offline RL data (e.g. a limited number of expert demonstrations) to convert the task-agnostic representations into more powerful task-specific representations; in stage 3, we fine-tune the agent with online RL. On a set of challenging hand manipulation tasks with sparse reward and realistic visual inputs, compared to the previous SOTA, VRL3 achieves an average of 780% better sample efficiency. And on the hardest task, VRL3 is 1220% more sample efficient (2440% when using a wider encoder) and solves the task with only 10% of the computation. These significant results clearly demonstrate the great potential of data-driven deep reinforcement learning.
summary: We propose VRL3, a powerful data-driven framework with a simple design for solving challenging visual deep reinforcement learning (DRL) tasks. We analyze a number of major obstacles in taking a data-driven approach, and present a suite of design principles, novel findings, and critical insights about data-driven visual DRL. Our framework has three stages: in stage 1, we leverage non-RL datasets (e.g. ImageNet) to learn task-agnostic visual representations; in stage 2, we use offline RL data (e.g. a limited number of expert demonstrations) to convert the task-agnostic representations into more powerful task-specific representations; in stage 3, we fine-tune the agent with online RL. On a set of challenging hand manipulation tasks with sparse reward and realistic visual inputs, compared to the previous SOTA, VRL3 achieves an average of 780% better sample efficiency. And on the hardest task, VRL3 is 1220% more sample efficient (2440% when using a wider encoder) and solves the task with only 10% of the computation. These significant results clearly demonstrate the great potential of data-driven deep reinforcement learning.
abstract_zh: 我们提出 VRL3，这是一个功能强大的数据驱动框架，具有简单的设计，用于解决具有挑战性的视觉深度强化学习 (DRL) 任务。我们分析了采用数据驱动方法的一些主要障碍，并提出了一套关于数据驱动的视觉 DRL 的设计原则、新颖的发现和关键见解。我们的框架分为三个阶段：在第 1 阶段，我们利用非 RL 数据集（例如 ImageNet）来学习与任务无关的视觉表示；在第二阶段，我们使用离线强化学习数据（例如有限数量的专家演示）将与任务无关的表示转换为更强大的特定于任务的表示；在第 3 阶段，我们使用在线强化学习对代理进行微调。在一组具有稀疏奖励和真实视觉输入的具有挑战性的手动操作任务上，与之前的 SOTA 相比，VRL3 的样本效率平均提高了 780%。在最困难的任务上，VRL3 的样本效率提高了 1220%（使用更宽的编码器时为 2440%），并且仅用 10% 的计算量即可解决该任务。这些重大结果清楚地证明了数据驱动的深度强化学习的巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VRL3框架，通过数据驱动方法解决具有挑战性的视觉深度强化学习任务。
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动视觉深度强化学习方法面临样本效率低、任务特定表示不足等核心问题，需探索更高效的框架设计。
AI.method: 分三阶段：1）利用非RL数据集（如ImageNet）学习通用视觉表示；2）通过离线RL数据生成任务特定表示；3）在线RL微调优化策略。
AI.result: 在稀疏奖励机械臂任务中，平均样本效率提升780%，最难任务仅需10%计算量即可完成（使用宽编码器时达2440%提升）。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动深度强化学习通过分阶段表示学习能显著提升效率，为复杂视觉任务提供新解决方案。

authors_text: Lin Huang,Qiyuan Dong,Lijun Wu,Jia Zhang,Jiang Bian,Tie-Yan Liu
title: AF$_2$: Adaptive Focus Framework for Aerial Imagery Segmentation
title_zh: AF$_2$：航空图像分割的自适应焦点框架
abstract: As a specific semantic segmentation task, aerial imagery segmentation has been widely employed in high spatial resolution (HSR) remote sensing images understanding. Besides common issues (e.g. large scale variation) faced by general semantic segmentation tasks, aerial imagery segmentation has some unique challenges, the most critical one among which lies in foreground-background imbalance. There have been some recent efforts that attempt to address this issue by proposing sophisticated neural network architectures, since they can be used to extract informative multi-scale feature representations and increase the discrimination of object boundaries. Nevertheless, many of them merely utilize those multi-scale representations in ad-hoc measures but disregard the fact that the semantic meaning of objects with various sizes could be better identified via receptive fields of diverse ranges. In this paper, we propose Adaptive Focus Framework (AF$_2$), which adopts a hierarchical segmentation procedure and focuses on adaptively utilizing multi-scale representations generated by widely adopted neural network architectures. Particularly, a learnable module, called Adaptive Confidence Mechanism (ACM), is proposed to determine which scale of representation should be used for the segmentation of different objects. Comprehensive experiments show that AF$_2$ has significantly improved the accuracy on three widely used aerial benchmarks, as fast as the mainstream method.
summary: As a specific semantic segmentation task, aerial imagery segmentation has been widely employed in high spatial resolution (HSR) remote sensing images understanding. Besides common issues (e.g. large scale variation) faced by general semantic segmentation tasks, aerial imagery segmentation has some unique challenges, the most critical one among which lies in foreground-background imbalance. There have been some recent efforts that attempt to address this issue by proposing sophisticated neural network architectures, since they can be used to extract informative multi-scale feature representations and increase the discrimination of object boundaries. Nevertheless, many of them merely utilize those multi-scale representations in ad-hoc measures but disregard the fact that the semantic meaning of objects with various sizes could be better identified via receptive fields of diverse ranges. In this paper, we propose Adaptive Focus Framework (AF$_2$), which adopts a hierarchical segmentation procedure and focuses on adaptively utilizing multi-scale representations generated by widely adopted neural network architectures. Particularly, a learnable module, called Adaptive Confidence Mechanism (ACM), is proposed to determine which scale of representation should be used for the segmentation of different objects. Comprehensive experiments show that AF$_2$ has significantly improved the accuracy on three widely used aerial benchmarks, as fast as the mainstream method.
abstract_zh: 作为一种特定的语义分割任务，航空影像分割已广泛应用于高空间分辨率（HSR）遥感图像理解。除了一般语义分割任务面临的常见问题（例如大规模变化）之外，航空图像分割还面临一些独特的挑战，其中最关键的挑战在于前景背景不平衡。最近有一些努力试图通过提出复杂的神经网络架构来解决这个问题，因为它们可以用来提取信息丰富的多尺度特征表示并增加对象边界的辨别力。然而，他们中的许多人只是在临时措施中利用这些多尺度表示，而忽视了通过不同范围的感受野可以更好地识别不同大小的对象的语义意义的事实。在本文中，我们提出了自适应焦点框架（AF$_2$），它采用分层分割过程，并专注于自适应地利用广泛采用的神经网络架构生成的多尺度表示。特别是，提出了一种称为自适应置信机制（ACM）的可学习模块来确定应使用哪种表示尺度来分割不同对象。综合实验表明，AF$_2$ 在三种广泛使用的航空基准上显着提高了精度，速度与主流方法一样快。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AF²框架，通过自适应多尺度特征利用解决遥感图像分割中的前景-背景不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法虽采用多尺度特征表示，但未能根据物体尺寸差异自适应选择合适感受野，导致分割精度受限。
AI.method: 设计分层分割流程与自适应置信度模块(ACM)，动态选择最优尺度特征进行目标分割。
AI.result: 在三个主流遥感数据集上显著提升分割精度，且保持与主流方法相当的推理速度。
AI.conclusion: AF²通过自适应多尺度特征选择有效缓解了遥感图像分割中的类别不平衡问题，验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Reena Zelenkova,Jack Swallow,M. A. P. Chamikara,Dongxi Liu,Mohan Baruwal Chhetri,Seyit Camtepe,Marthie Grobler,Mahathir Almashor
title: Resurrecting Trust in Facial Recognition: Mitigating Backdoor Attacks in Face Recognition to Prevent Potential Privacy Breaches
title_zh: 恢复对面部识别的信任：减轻面部识别中的后门攻击，以防止潜在的隐私泄露
abstract: Biometric data, such as face images, are often associated with sensitive information (e.g medical, financial, personal government records). Hence, a data breach in a system storing such information can have devastating consequences. Deep learning is widely utilized for face recognition (FR); however, such models are vulnerable to backdoor attacks executed by malicious parties. Backdoor attacks cause a model to misclassify a particular class as a target class during recognition. This vulnerability can allow adversaries to gain access to highly sensitive data protected by biometric authentication measures or allow the malicious party to masquerade as an individual with higher system permissions. Such breaches pose a serious privacy threat. Previous methods integrate noise addition mechanisms into face recognition models to mitigate this issue and improve the robustness of classification against backdoor attacks. However, this can drastically affect model accuracy. We propose a novel and generalizable approach (named BA-BAM: Biometric Authentication - Backdoor Attack Mitigation), that aims to prevent backdoor attacks on face authentication deep learning models through transfer learning and selective image perturbation. The empirical evidence shows that BA-BAM is highly robust and incurs a maximal accuracy drop of 2.4%, while reducing the attack success rate to a maximum of 20%. Comparisons with existing approaches show that BA-BAM provides a more practical backdoor mitigation approach for face recognition.

The empirical evidence shows that BA-BAM is highly robust and incurs a maximal accuracy drop of 2.4%, while reducing the attack success rate to a maximum of 20%. Comparisons with existing approaches show that BA-BAM provides a more practical backdoor mitigation approach for face recognition.
abstract_zh: 生物识别数据（例如面部图像）通常与敏感信息（例如医疗、财务、个人政府记录）相关联。因此，存储此类信息的系统中的数据泄露可能会造成灾难性后果。深度学习广泛应用于人脸识别（FR）；然而，此类模型很容易受到恶意方执行的后门攻击。后门攻击导致模型在识别过程中将特定类别错误分类为目标类别。此漏洞可能允许攻击者访问受生物识别身份验证措施保护的高度敏感数据，或允许恶意方伪装成具有更高系统权限的个人。此类违规行为构成严重的隐私威胁。以前的方法将噪声添加机制集成到人脸识别模型中，以缓解此问题并提高针对后门攻击的分类鲁棒性。然而，这会极大地影响模型的准确性。我们提出了一种新颖且可推广的方法（名为 BA-BAM：生物识别认证 - 后门攻击缓解），旨在通过迁移学习和选择性图像扰动来防止对人脸认证深度学习模型的后门攻击。经验证据表明，BA-BAM 具有很高的鲁棒性，准确率最大下降 2.4%，同时攻击成功率最多降低 20%。与现有方法的比较表明，BA-BAM 为人脸识别提供了一种更实用的后门缓解方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BA-BAM的新方法，通过迁移学习和选择性图像扰动来防止人脸识别系统中的后门攻击，以保护隐私。
AI.motivation: 生物特征数据（如人脸图像）与敏感信息相关，系统数据泄露可能导致严重隐私风险。现有方法通过添加噪声来缓解后门攻击，但会显著降低模型准确性。
AI.method: 提出BA-BAM方法，结合迁移学习与选择性图像扰动技术，在不显著影响模型精度的前提下增强对抗后门攻击的能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，BA-BAM在准确率仅下降2.4%的情况下，将攻击成功率降至最大20%，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: BA-BAM为人脸识别系统的后门攻击防御提供了更实用且高效的解决方案，兼顾安全性与准确性。

search_text: Resurrecting Trust in Facial Recognition: Mitigating Backdoor Attacks in Face Recognition to Prevent Potential Privacy Breaches 恢复对面部识别的信任：减轻面部识别中的后门攻击，以防止潜在的隐私泄露 Biometric data, such as face images, are often associated with sensitive information (e.g medical, financial, personal government records). Hence, a data breach in a system storing such information can have devastating consequences. Deep learning is widely utilized for face recognition (FR); however, such models are vulnerable to backdoor attacks executed by malicious parties. Backdoor attacks cause a model to misclassify a particular class as a target class during recognition. This vulnerability can allow adversaries to gain access to highly sensitive data protected by biometric authentication measures or allow the malicious party to masquerade as an individual with higher system permissions. Such breaches pose a serious privacy threat. Previous methods integrate noise addition mechanisms into face recognition models to mitigate this issue and improve the robustness of classification against backdoor attacks. However, this can drastically affect model accuracy. We propose a novel and generalizable approach (named BA-BAM: Biometric Authentication - Backdoor Attack Mitigation), that aims to prevent backdoor attacks on face authentication deep learning models through transfer learning and selective image perturbation. The empirical evidence shows that BA-BAM is highly robust and incurs a maximal accuracy drop of 2.4%, while reducing the attack success rate to a maximum of 20%. Comparisons with existing approaches show that BA-BAM provides a more practical backdoor mitigation approach for face recognition. 生物识别数据（例如面部图像）通常与敏感信息（例如医疗、财务、个人政府记录）相关联。因此，存储此类信息的系统中的数据泄露可能会造成灾难性后果。深度学习广泛应用于人脸识别（FR）；然而，此类模型很容易受到恶意方执行的后门攻击。后门攻击导致模型在识别过程中将特定类别错误分类为目标类别。此漏洞可能允许攻击者访问受生物识别身份验证措施保护的高度敏感数据，或允许恶意方伪装成具有更高系统权限的个人。此类违规行为构成严重的隐私威胁。以前的方法将噪声添加机制集成到人脸识别模型中，以缓解此问题并提高针对后门攻击的分类鲁棒性。然而，这会极大地影响模型的准确性。我们提出了一种新颖且可推广的方法（名为 BA-BAM：生物识别认证 - 后门攻击缓解），旨在通过迁移学习和选择性图像扰动来防止对人脸认证深度学习模型的后门攻击。经验证据表明，BA-BAM 具有很高的鲁棒性，准确率最大下降 2.4%，同时攻击成功率最多降低 20%。与现有方法的比较表明，BA-BAM 为人脸识别提供了一种更实用的后门缓解方法。 本文提出了一种名为BA-BAM的新方法，通过迁移学习和选择性图像扰动来防止人脸识别系统中的后门攻击，以保护隐私。 Reena Zelenkova,Jack Swallow,M. authors_text: Anthony Ramirez,Vyron Vellis
title: Time complexity of the Analyst's Traveling Salesman algorithm
title_zh: 分析师旅行商算法的时间复杂度
abstract: The Analyst's Traveling Salesman Problem asks for conditions under which a (finite or infinite) subset of $\mathbb{R}^N$ is contained on a curve of finite length. We show that for finite sets, the algorithm constructed by Schul (2007)and Badger-Naples-Vellis (2019) that solves the Analyst's Traveling Salesman Problem has polynomial time complexity and we determine the sharp exponent.
summary: The Analyst's Traveling Salesman Problem asks for conditions under which a (finite or infinite) subset of $\mathbb{R}^N$ is contained on a curve of finite length. We show that for finite sets, the algorithm constructed by Schul (2007)and Badger-Naples-Vellis (2019) that solves the Analyst's Traveling Salesman Problem has polynomial time complexity and we determine the sharp exponent.
abstract_zh: 分析师的旅行商问题要求$\mathbb{R}^N$ 的（有限或无限）子集包含在有限长度的曲线上。我们证明，对于有限集，Schul (2007) 和 Badger-Naples-Vellis (2019) 构建的解决分析师旅行商问题的算法具有多项式时间复杂度，并且我们确定锐指数。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了分析师旅行商问题算法的时间复杂度，确定其多项式时间的精确指数。
AI.motivation: 分析师旅行商问题在几何和分析领域具有重要意义，明确算法的时间复杂度有助于推动理论发展和实际应用。
AI.method: 通过数学分析与计算复杂度理论，结合Schul及Badger等人的算法框架，推导并验证时间复杂度的多项式指数。
AI.result: 证明该算法对有限集具有多项式时间复杂度，并确定了最优指数，填补了该问题的理论空白。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为分析师旅行商问题提供了时间复杂度的严格理论分析，为后续算法优化与应用奠定了基础。

authors_text: Ahmed Abdou,Ryan Sheatsley,Yohan Beugin,Tyler Shipp,Patrick McDaniel
title: HoneyModels: Machine Learning Honeypots
title_zh: HoneyModels：机器学习蜜罐
comment: Published in: MILCOM 2021 - 2021 IEEE Military Communications Conference (MILCOM)
comments: Published in: MILCOM 2021 - 2021 IEEE Military Communications Conference (MILCOM)
abstract: Machine Learning is becoming a pivotal aspect of many systems today, offering newfound performance on classification and prediction tasks, but this rapid integration also comes with new unforeseen vulnerabilities. To harden these systems the ever-growing field of Adversarial Machine Learning has proposed new attack and defense mechanisms. However, a great asymmetry exists as these defensive methods can only provide security to certain models and lack scalability, computational efficiency, and practicality due to overly restrictive constraints. Moreover, newly introduced attacks can easily bypass defensive strategies by making subtle alterations. In this paper, we study an alternate approach inspired by honeypots to detect adversaries. Our approach yields learned models with an embedded watermark. When an adversary initiates an interaction with our model, attacks are encouraged to add this predetermined watermark stimulating detection of adversarial examples. We show that HoneyModels can reveal 69.5% of adversaries attempting to attack a Neural Network while preserving the original functionality of the model. HoneyModels offer an alternate direction to secure Machine Learning that slightly affects the accuracy while encouraging the creation of watermarked adversarial samples detectable by the HoneyModel but indistinguishable from others for the adversary.
summary: Machine Learning is becoming a pivotal aspect of many systems today, offering newfound performance on classification and prediction tasks, but this rapid integration also comes with new unforeseen vulnerabilities. To harden these systems the ever-growing field of Adversarial Machine Learning has proposed new attack and defense mechanisms. However, a great asymmetry exists as these defensive methods can only provide security to certain models and lack scalability, computational efficiency, and practicality due to overly restrictive constraints. Moreover, newly introduced attacks can easily bypass defensive strategies by making subtle alterations. In this paper, we study an alternate approach inspired by honeypots to detect adversaries. Our approach yields learned models with an embedded watermark. When an adversary initiates an interaction with our model, attacks are encouraged to add this predetermined watermark stimulating detection of adversarial examples. We show that HoneyModels can reveal 69.5% of adversaries attempting to attack a Neural Network while preserving the original functionality of the model. HoneyModels offer an alternate direction to secure Machine Learning that slightly affects the accuracy while encouraging the creation of watermarked adversarial samples detectable by the HoneyModel but indistinguishable from others for the adversary.
abstract_zh: 机器学习正在成为当今许多系统的关键方面，为分类和预测任务提供新的性能，但这种快速集成也带来了新的不可预见的漏洞。为了强化这些系统，不断发展的对抗性机器学习领域提出了新的攻击和防御机制。然而，这些防御方法存在很大的不对称性，只能为某些模型提供安全性，并且由于过于严格的限制而缺乏可扩展性、计算效率和实用性。此外，新引入的攻击可以通过进行微妙的改变来轻松绕过防御策略。在本文中，我们研究了一种受蜜罐启发的替代方法来检测对手。我们的方法产生带有嵌入水印的学习模型。当对手发起与我们的模型的交互时，鼓励攻击添加此预定的水印，刺激对对抗性示例的检测。我们表明，HoneyModels 可以揭示 69.5% 的试图攻击神经网络的对手，同时保留模型的原始功能。 HoneyModels 提供了另一种确保机器学习安全的方向，该方向稍微影响准确性，同时鼓励创建由 HoneyModel 可检测到的带水印的对抗性样本，但对手无法将其与其他样本区分开来。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HoneyModels，一种通过嵌入水印的机器学习模型检测对抗攻击的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗机器学习防御方法存在可扩展性差、计算效率低及易被绕过等问题，需探索更有效的检测机制。
AI.method: 受蜜罐启发，设计嵌入预设水印的模型，使攻击者在扰动样本时触发水印，从而被检测到。
AI.result: 实验显示HoneyModels可检测69.5%的对抗攻击，同时保持模型原始功能且不影响准确性。
AI.conclusion: HoneyModels为机器学习安全提供新方向，在轻微精度损失下实现对抗样本的有效检测。

HoneyModels offer an alternate direction to secure Machine Learning that slightly affects the accuracy while encouraging the creation of watermarked adversarial samples detectable by the HoneyModel but indistinguishable from others for the adversary. 机器学习正在成为当今许多系统的关键方面，为分类和预测任务提供新的性能，但这种快速集成也带来了新的不可预见的漏洞。为了强化这些系统，不断发展的对抗性机器学习领域提出了新的攻击和防御机制。然而，这些防御方法存在很大的不对称性，只能为某些模型提供安全性，并且由于过于严格的限制而缺乏可扩展性、计算效率和实用性。此外，新引入的攻击可以通过进行微妙的改变来轻松绕过防御策略。在本文中，我们研究了一种受蜜罐启发的替代方法来检测对手。我们的方法产生带有嵌入水印的学习模型。当对手发起与我们的模型的交互时，鼓励攻击添加此预定的水印，刺激对对抗性示例的检测。我们表明，HoneyModels 可以揭示 69.5% 的试图攻击神经网络的对手，同时保留模型的原始功能。 HoneyModels 提供了另一种确保机器学习安全的方向，该方向稍微影响准确性，同时鼓励创建由 HoneyModel 可检测到的带水印的对抗性样本，但对手无法将其与其他样本区分开来。 本文提出HoneyModels，一种通过嵌入水印的机器学习模型检测对抗攻击的新方法。 Ahmed Abdou,Ryan Sheatsley,Yohan Beugin,Tyler Shipp,Patrick McDaniel cs.CR,cs.AI

authors_text: Minghui Liao,Zhisheng Zou,Zhaoyi Wan,Cong Yao,Xiang Bai
title: Real-Time Scene Text Detection with Differentiable Binarization and Adaptive Scale Fusion
title_zh: 具有可微二值化和自适应尺度融合的实时场景文本检测
comment: Accepted by TPAMI. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1911.08947
comments: Accepted by TPAMI. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1911.08947
abstract: Recently, segmentation-based scene text detection methods have drawn extensive attention in the scene text detection field, because of their superiority in detecting the text instances of arbitrary shapes and extreme aspect ratios, profiting from the pixel-level descriptions. However, the vast majority of the existing segmentation-based approaches are limited to their complex post-processing algorithms and the scale robustness of their segmentation models, where the post-processing algorithms are not only isolated to the model optimization but also time-consuming and the scale robustness is usually strengthened by fusing multi-scale feature maps directly. In this paper, we propose a Differentiable Binarization (DB) module that integrates the binarization process, one of the most important steps in the post-processing procedure, into a segmentation network. Optimized along with the proposed DB module, the segmentation network can produce more accurate results, which enhances the accuracy of text detection with a simple pipeline. Furthermore, an efficient Adaptive Scale Fusion (ASF) module is proposed to improve the scale robustness by fusing features of different scales adaptively. By incorporating the proposed DB and ASF with the segmentation network, our proposed scene text detector consistently achieves state-of-the-art results, in terms of both detection accuracy and speed, on five standard benchmarks.
summary: Recently, segmentation-based scene text detection methods have drawn extensive attention in the scene text detection field, because of their superiority in detecting the text instances of arbitrary shapes and extreme aspect ratios, profiting from the pixel-level descriptions. However, the vast majority of the existing segmentation-based approaches are limited to their complex post-processing algorithms and the scale robustness of their segmentation models, where the post-processing algorithms are not only isolated to the model optimization but also time-consuming and the scale robustness is usually strengthened by fusing multi-scale feature maps directly. In this paper, we propose a Differentiable Binarization (DB) module that integrates the binarization process, one of the most important steps in the post-processing procedure, into a segmentation network. Optimized along with the proposed DB module, the segmentation network can produce more accurate results, which enhances the accuracy of text detection with a simple pipeline. Furthermore, an efficient Adaptive Scale Fusion (ASF) module is proposed to improve the scale robustness by fusing features of different scales adaptively. By incorporating the proposed DB and ASF with the segmentation network, our proposed scene text detector consistently achieves state-of-the-art results, in terms of both detection accuracy and speed, on five standard benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于分割的场景文本检测方法在场景文本检测领域引起了广泛的关注，因为它们受益于像素级描述，在检测任意形状和极端长宽比的文本实例方面具有优越性。然而，现有的绝大多数基于分割的方法仅限于其复杂的后处理算法和分割模型的尺度鲁棒性，其中后处理算法不仅与模型优化隔离而且耗时，并且通常通过直接融合多尺度特征图来增强尺度鲁棒性。在本文中，我们提出了一种可微分二值化（DB）模块，它将二值化过程（后处理过程中最重要的步骤之一）集成到分割网络中。与所提出的数据库模块一起优化，分割网络可以产生更准确的结果，从而通过简单的管道提高文本检测的准确性。此外，提出了一种高效的自适应尺度融合（ASF）模块，通过自适应地融合不同尺度的特征来提高尺度鲁棒性。通过将所提出的 DB 和 ASF 与分割网络相结合，我们提出的场景文本检测器在五个标准基准测试中，在检测精度和速度方面始终达到了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合可微二值化模块（DB）和自适应尺度融合模块（ASF）的实时场景文本检测方法，以提高检测精度和速度。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于分割的场景文本检测方法存在后处理算法复杂且耗时、尺度鲁棒性不足的问题，需改进以提升检测效率与准确性。
AI.method: 设计可微二值化模块将传统后处理步骤融入分割网络，并提出自适应尺度融合模块通过动态融合多尺度特征提升尺度鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在五个标准数据集上实现了检测精度和速度的最先进水平，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合DB与ASF模块，提出的检测器在保持实时性的同时显著提升了复杂场景下文本检测的性能。

Furthermore, an efficient Adaptive Scale Fusion (ASF) module is proposed to improve the scale robustness by fusing features of different scales adaptively. By incorporating the proposed DB and ASF with the segmentation network, our proposed scene text detector consistently achieves state-of-the-art results, in terms of both detection accuracy and speed, on five standard benchmarks. 近年来，基于分割的场景文本检测方法在场景文本检测领域引起了广泛的关注，因为它们受益于像素级描述，在检测任意形状和极端长宽比的文本实例方面具有优越性。然而，现有的绝大多数基于分割的方法仅限于其复杂的后处理算法和分割模型的尺度鲁棒性，其中后处理算法不仅与模型优化隔离而且耗时，并且通常通过直接融合多尺度特征图来增强尺度鲁棒性。在本文中，我们提出了一种可微分二值化（DB）模块，它将二值化过程（后处理过程中最重要的步骤之一）集成到分割网络中。与所提出的数据库模块一起优化，分割网络可以产生更准确的结果，从而通过简单的管道提高文本检测的准确性。此外，提出了一种高效的自适应尺度融合（ASF）模块，通过自适应地融合不同尺度的特征来提高尺度鲁棒性。通过将所提出的 DB 和 ASF 与分割网络相结合，我们提出的场景文本检测器在五个标准基准测试中，在检测精度和速度方面始终达到了最先进的结果。 本文提出了一种结合可微二值化模块（DB）和自适应尺度融合模块（ASF）的实时场景文本检测方法，以提高检测精度和速度。 Minghui Liao,Zhisheng Zou,Zhaoyi Wan,Cong Yao,Xiang Bai cs.CV

authors_text: Jiong Wang,Zhou Zhao,Weike Jin,Xinyu Duan,Zhen Lei,Baoxing Huai,Yiling Wu,Xiaofei He
title: VLAD-VSA: Cross-Domain Face Presentation Attack Detection with Vocabulary Separation and Adaptation
title_zh: VLAD-VSA：具有词汇分离和适应的跨域人脸呈现攻击检测
abstract: For face presentation attack detection (PAD), most of the spoofing cues are subtle, local image patterns (e.g., local image distortion, 3D mask edge and cut photo edges). The representations of existing PAD works with simple global pooling method, however, lose the local feature discriminability. In this paper, the VLAD aggregation method is adopted to quantize local features with visual vocabulary locally partitioning the feature space, and hence preserve the local discriminability. We further propose the vocabulary separation and adaptation method to modify VLAD for cross-domain PADtask. The proposed vocabulary separation method divides vocabulary into domain-shared and domain-specific visual words to cope with the diversity of live and attack faces under the cross-domain scenario. The proposed vocabulary adaptation method imitates the maximization step of the k-means algorithm in the end-to-end training, which guarantees the visual words be close to the center of assigned local features and thus brings robust similarity measurement. We give illustrations and extensive experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of VLAD with the proposed vocabulary separation and adaptation method on standard cross-domain PAD benchmarks. The codes are available at https://github.com/Liubinggunzu/VLAD-VSA.
summary: For face presentation attack detection (PAD), most of the spoofing cues are subtle, local image patterns (e.g., local image distortion, 3D mask edge and cut photo edges). The representations of existing PAD works with simple global pooling method, however, lose the local feature discriminability. In this paper, the VLAD aggregation method is adopted to quantize local features with visual vocabulary locally partitioning the feature space, and hence preserve the local discriminability. We further propose the vocabulary separation and adaptation method to modify VLAD for cross-domain PADtask. The proposed vocabulary separation method divides vocabulary into domain-shared and domain-specific visual words to cope with the diversity of live and attack faces under the cross-domain scenario. The proposed vocabulary adaptation method imitates the maximization step of the k-means algorithm in the end-to-end training, which guarantees the visual words be close to the center of assigned local features and thus brings robust similarity measurement. We give illustrations and extensive experiments to demonstrate the effectiveness of VLAD with the proposed vocabulary separation and adaptation method on standard cross-domain PAD benchmarks. The codes are available at https://github.com/Liubinggunzu/VLAD-VSA.
abstract_zh: 对于面部呈现攻击检测 (PAD)，大多数欺骗线索都是微妙的局部图像模式（例如局部图像失真、3D 掩模边缘和剪切照片边缘）。现有 PAD 的表示采用简单的全局池化方法，但是失去了局部特征的可辨别性。本文采用VLAD聚合方法通过视觉词汇对特征空间进行局部划分来量化局部特征，从而保持局部可辨别性。我们进一步提出了词汇分离和自适应方法来修改跨域 PAD 任务的 VLAD。所提出的词汇分离方法将词汇分为领域共享的视觉词和领域特定的视觉词，以应对跨域场景下实时和攻击面孔的多样性。所提出的词汇适应方法在端到端训练中模仿k-means算法的最大化步骤，保证视觉词接近分配的局部特征的中心，从而带来鲁棒的相似性测量。我们提供了插图和广泛的实验来证明 VLAD 的有效性，以及所提出的词汇分离和适应方法在标准跨域 PAD 基准上的有效性。这些代码可从 https://github.com/Liubinggunzu/VLAD-VSA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VLAD-VSA方法，通过词汇分离与适应技术提升跨领域人脸呈现攻击检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法采用简单全局池化导致局部特征判别性丢失，且难以应对跨领域场景下活体与攻击样本的特征多样性。
AI.method: 采用VLAD聚合方法量化局部特征，提出词汇分离（区分领域共享与特定视觉词）和词汇适应（模仿k-means最大化步骤优化视觉词中心）技术。
AI.result: 在标准跨领域PAD基准数据集上实验验证了方法有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过保留局部特征判别性并优化跨领域词汇适应，VLAD-VSA显著提升了人脸防伪检测的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Danny Merkx,Stefan L. Frank,Mirjam Ernestus
title: Seeing the advantage: visually grounding word embeddings to better capture human semantic knowledge
title_zh: 看到优势：视觉基础的词嵌入可以更好地捕获人类语义知识
comment: ef:Proceedings of the Workshop on Cognitive Modeling and Computational Linguistics (CMCL) 2022
comments: ef:Proceedings of the Workshop on Cognitive Modeling and Computational Linguistics (CMCL) 2022
abstract: Distributional semantic models capture word-level meaning that is useful in many natural language processing tasks and have even been shown to capture cognitive aspects of word meaning. The majority of these models are purely text based, even though the human sensory experience is much richer. In this paper we create visually grounded word embeddings by combining English text and images and compare them to popular text-based methods, to see if visual information allows our model to better capture cognitive aspects of word meaning. Our analysis shows that visually grounded embedding similarities are more predictive of the human reaction times in a large priming experiment than the purely text-based embeddings. The visually grounded embeddings also correlate well with human word similarity ratings. Importantly, in both experiments we show that the grounded embeddings account for a unique portion of explained variance, even when we include text-based embeddings trained on huge corpora. This shows that visual grounding allows our model to capture information that cannot be extracted using text as the only source of information.
summary: Distributional semantic models capture word-level meaning that is useful in many natural language processing tasks and have even been shown to capture cognitive aspects of word meaning. The majority of these models are purely text based, even though the human sensory experience is much richer. In this paper we create visually grounded word embeddings by combining English text and images and compare them to popular text-based methods, to see if visual information allows our model to better capture cognitive aspects of word meaning. Our analysis shows that visually grounded embedding similarities are more predictive of the human reaction times in a large priming experiment than the purely text-based embeddings. The visually grounded embeddings also correlate well with human word similarity ratings. Importantly, in both experiments we show that the grounded embeddings account for a unique portion of explained variance, even when we include text-based embeddings trained on huge corpora. This shows that visual grounding allows our model to capture information that cannot be extracted using text as the only source of information.
abstract_zh: 分布式语义模型捕获在许多自然语言处理任务中有用的单词级含义，甚至已被证明可以捕获单词含义的认知方面。尽管人类的感官体验要丰富得多，但大多数模型都是纯粹基于文本的。在本文中，我们通过结合英语文本和图像来创建基于视觉的单词嵌入，并将它们与流行的基于文本的方法进行比较，看看视觉信息是否允许我们的模型更好地捕获单词含义的认知方面。我们的分析表明，在大型启动实验中，基于视觉的嵌入相似性比纯粹基于文本的嵌入更能预测人类的反应时间。基于视觉的嵌入也与人类单词相似度评级密切相关。重要的是，在这两个实验中，我们都表明，即使我们包含在巨大语料库上训练的基于文本的嵌入，接地嵌入也解释了方差的独特部分。这表明视觉基础允许我们的模型捕获无法使用文本作为唯一信息来源提取的信息。

AI.tldr: 本文通过结合文本和图像信息构建视觉基础的词嵌入模型，以更准确地捕捉人类语义知识。
AI.motivation: 现有词嵌入模型仅依赖文本数据，而人类语义认知包含丰富的感官体验，需引入视觉信息提升模型表现。
AI.method: 融合英语文本与图像数据生成视觉基础词嵌入，并与纯文本方法对比，通过人类反应时间实验和词语相似性评分验证效果。
AI.result: 视觉基础嵌入在预测人类反应时间和词语相似性上优于纯文本模型，且能解释独立于文本嵌入的额外方差。
AI.conclusion: 视觉信息能为模型提供文本无法获取的语义信息，证明多模态融合对提升语义表征的有效性。

authors_text: Mengzhe Geng,Xurong Xie,Zi Ye,Tianzi Wang,Guinan Li,Shujie Hu,Xunying Liu,Helen Meng
title: Speaker Adaptation Using Spectro-Temporal Deep Features for Dysarthric and Elderly Speech Recognition
title_zh: 使用谱时深度特征进行构音障碍和老年人语音识别的说话人适应
comment: In submission to IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio Speech and Language Processing
comments: In submission to IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio Speech and Language Processing
abstract: Despite the rapid progress of automatic speech recognition (ASR) technologies targeting normal speech in recent decades, accurate recognition of dysarthric and elderly speech remains highly challenging tasks to date. Sources of heterogeneity commonly found in normal speech including accent or gender, when further compounded with the variability over age and speech pathology severity level, create large diversity among speakers. To this end, speaker adaptation techniques play a key role in personalization of ASR systems for such users. Motivated by the spectro-temporal level differences between dysarthric, elderly and normal speech that systematically manifest in articulatory imprecision, decreased volume and clarity, slower speaking rates and increased dysfluencies, novel spectrotemporal subspace basis deep embedding features derived using SVD speech spectrum decomposition are proposed in this paper to facilitate auxiliary feature based speaker adaptation of state-of-the-art hybrid DNN/TDNN and end-to-end Conformer speech recognition systems. Experiments were conducted on four tasks: the English UASpeech and TORGO dysarthric speech corpora; the English DementiaBank Pitt and Cantonese JCCOCC MoCA elderly speech datasets. The proposed spectro-temporal deep feature adapted systems outperformed baseline i-Vector and xVector adaptation by up to 2.63% absolute (8.63% relative) reduction in word error rate (WER). Consistent performance improvements were retained after model based speaker adaptation using learning hidden unit contributions (LHUC) was further applied. The best speaker adapted system using the proposed spectral basis embedding features produced the lowest published WER of 25.05% on the UASpeech test set of 16 dysarthric speakers.

Sources of heterogeneity commonly found in normal speech including accent or gender, when further compounded with the variability over age and speech pathology severity level, create large diversity among speakers. To this end, speaker adaptation techniques play a key role in personalization of ASR systems for such users. Motivated by the spectro-temporal level differences between dysarthric, elderly and normal speech that systematically manifest in articulatory imprecision, decreased volume and clarity, slower speaking rates and increased dysfluencies, novel spectrotemporal subspace basis deep embedding features derived using SVD speech spectrum decomposition are proposed in this paper to facilitate auxiliary feature based speaker adaptation of state-of-the-art hybrid DNN/TDNN and end-to-end Conformer speech recognition systems. Experiments were conducted on four tasks: the English UASpeech and TORGO dysarthric speech corpora; the English DementiaBank Pitt and Cantonese JCCOCC MoCA elderly speech datasets. The proposed spectro-temporal deep feature adapted systems outperformed baseline i-Vector and xVector adaptation by up to 2.63% absolute (8.63% relative) reduction in word error rate (WER). Consistent performance improvements were retained after model based speaker adaptation using learning hidden unit contributions (LHUC) was further applied. The best speaker adapted system using the proposed spectral basis embedding features produced the lowest published WER of 25.05% on the UASpeech test set of 16 dysarthric speakers.
abstract_zh: 尽管近几十年来针对正常语音的自动语音识别（ASR）技术取得了快速进展，但迄今为止，准确识别构音障碍和老年人语音仍然是极具挑战性的任务。正常言语中常见的异质性来源包括口音或性别，当进一步与年龄和言语病理严重程度的变异性相结合时，会在说话者之间产生巨大的多样性。为此，说话者适应技术在针对此类用户的 ASR 系统个性化中发挥着关键作用。由于构音障碍、老年人和正常语音之间的谱时水平差异系统地表现为发音不精确、音量和清晰度下降、语速变慢和流畅性增加，本文提出了使用 SVD 语音谱分解导出的新型谱时子空间深度嵌入特征，以促进最先进的混合 DNN/TDNN 和端到端 Conformer 语音识别系统的基于辅助特征的说话人适应。实验在四个任务上进行：英语 UASpeech 和 TORGO 构音障碍语音语料库；英语 DementiaBank Pitt 和粤语 JCCOCC MoCA 老年人语音数据集。所提出的谱时深度特征自适应系统优于基线 i-Vector 和 xVector 自适应，字错误率 (WER) 绝对降低了 2.63%（相对 8.63%）。在进一步应用使用学习隐藏单元贡献（LHUC）的基于模型的说话人自适应之后，保持了一致的性能改进。使用所提出的频谱基础嵌入功能的最佳扬声器适应系统在 16 个构音障碍扬声器的 UASpeech 测试集上产生了已发表的最低 WER 25.05%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于谱时深度特征的说话人自适应方法，以提高对构音障碍和老年语音的自动语音识别准确率。
AI.motivation: 构音障碍和老年语音因发音不精确、音量降低、语速减慢等因素导致语音识别难度大，传统i-Vector/xVector方法难以有效应对此类语音的多样性。
AI.method: 通过SVD语音频谱分解提取谱时子空间基深嵌入特征，结合DNN/TDNN和端到端Conformer系统，并应用基于学习隐藏单元贡献（LHUC）的模型自适应方法。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上实现最高2.63%绝对值（8.63%相对值）的词错误率（WER）下降，UASpeech测试集上达到25.05%的最低WER。
AI.conclusion: 提出的谱时深度特征有效提升了构音障碍和老年语音识别性能，优于现有自适应方法，为特殊人群语音识别提供了新思路。

authors_text: Anjith George,David Geissbuhler,Sebastien Marcel
title: A Comprehensive Evaluation on Multi-channel Biometric Face Presentation Attack Detection
title_zh: 多通道生物识别人脸呈现攻击检测的综合评估
abstract: The vulnerability against presentation attacks is a crucial problem undermining the wide-deployment of face recognition systems. Though presentation attack detection (PAD) systems try to address this problem, the lack of generalization and robustness continues to be a major concern. Several works have shown that using multi-channel PAD systems could alleviate this vulnerability and result in more robust systems. However, there is a wide selection of channels available for a PAD system such as RGB, Near Infrared, Shortwave Infrared, Depth, and Thermal sensors. Having a lot of sensors increases the cost of the system, and therefore an understanding of the performance of different sensors against a wide variety of attacks is necessary while selecting the modalities. In this work, we perform a comprehensive study to understand the effectiveness of various imaging modalities for PAD. The studies are performed on a multi-channel PAD dataset, collected with 14 different sensing modalities considering a wide range of 2D, 3D, and partial attacks. We used the multi-channel convolutional network-based architecture, which uses pixel-wise binary supervision. The model has been evaluated with different combinations of channels, and different image qualities on a variety of challenging known and unknown attack protocols. The results reveal interesting trends and can act as pointers for sensor selection for safety-critical presentation attack detection systems. The source codes and protocols to reproduce the results are made available publicly making it possible to extend this work to other architectures.

Though presentation attack detection (PAD) systems try to address this problem, the lack of generalization and robustness continues to be a major concern. Several works have shown that using multi-channel PAD systems could alleviate this vulnerability and result in more robust systems. However, there is a wide selection of channels available for a PAD system such as RGB, Near Infrared, Shortwave Infrared, Depth, and Thermal sensors. Having a lot of sensors increases the cost of the system, and therefore an understanding of the performance of different sensors against a wide variety of attacks is necessary while selecting the modalities. In this work, we perform a comprehensive study to understand the effectiveness of various imaging modalities for PAD. The studies are performed on a multi-channel PAD dataset, collected with 14 different sensing modalities considering a wide range of 2D, 3D, and partial attacks. We used the multi-channel convolutional network-based architecture, which uses pixel-wise binary supervision. The model has been evaluated with different combinations of channels, and different image qualities on a variety of challenging known and unknown attack protocols. The results reveal interesting trends and can act as pointers for sensor selection for safety-critical presentation attack detection systems. The source codes and protocols to reproduce the results are made available publicly making it possible to extend this work to other architectures.
abstract_zh: 针对演示攻击的漏洞是破坏人脸识别系统广泛部署的一个关键问题。尽管演示攻击检测（PAD）系统试图解决这个问题，但缺乏通用性和鲁棒性仍然是一个主要问题。多项研究表明，使用多通道 PAD 系统可以缓解此漏洞并产生更强大的系统。然而，PAD 系统有多种通道可供选择，例如 RGB、近红外、短波红外、深度和热传感器。拥有大量传感器会增加系统成本，因此在选择模式时有必要了解不同传感器针对各种攻击的性能。在这项工作中，我们进行了一项全面的研究，以了解各种成像方式对 PAD 的有效性。这些研究是在多通道 PAD 数据集上进行的，该数据集考虑了广泛的 2D、3D 和部分攻击，通过 14 种不同的传感方式收集。我们使用基于多通道卷积网络的架构，该架构使用像素级二进制监督。该模型已在各种具有挑战性的已知和未知攻击协议上使用不同的通道组合和不同的图像质量进行了评估。结果揭示了有趣的趋势，可以作为安全关键型演示攻击检测系统的传感器选择指南。重现结果的源代码和协议已公开提供，从而可以将这项工作扩展到其他架构。

AI.tldr: 本文对多通道生物特征人脸识别防攻击检测系统进行了全面评估，研究不同传感器模态在对抗多种攻击时的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有防攻击检测系统存在泛化性和鲁棒性不足的问题，而多通道系统虽能提升性能但传感器选择成本高，需明确不同模态的性能差异以优化系统设计。
AI.method: 基于多通道卷积网络架构，采用像素级二值监督，结合14种传感模态构建数据集，通过多通道组合与不同图像质量测试，评估对抗已知和未知攻击协议的性能。
AI.result: 实验揭示了不同传感器模态在应对2D、3D及部分攻击时的性能趋势，为安全关键场景的传感器选型提供了参考依据。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为多通道防攻击系统设计提供了传感器选择指南，公开的代码和协议可支持后续架构扩展与验证。

search_text: A Comprehensive Evaluation on Multi-channel Biometric Face Presentation Attack Detection 多通道生物识别人脸呈现攻击检测的综合评估 The vulnerability against presentation attacks is a crucial problem undermining the wide-deployment of face recognition systems. Though presentation attack detection (PAD) systems try to address this problem, the lack of generalization and robustness continues to be a major concern. Several works have shown that using multi-channel PAD systems could alleviate this vulnerability and result in more robust systems. However, there is a wide selection of channels available for a PAD system such as RGB, Near Infrared, Shortwave Infrared, Depth, and Thermal sensors. Having a lot of sensors increases the cost of the system, and therefore an understanding of the performance of different sensors against a wide variety of attacks is necessary while selecting the modalities. In this work, we perform a comprehensive study to understand the effectiveness of various imaging modalities for PAD. The studies are performed on a multi-channel PAD dataset, collected with 14 different sensing modalities considering a wide range of 2D, 3D, and partial attacks. We used the multi-channel convolutional network-based architecture, which uses pixel-wise binary supervision. The model has been evaluated with different combinations of channels, and different image qualities on a variety of challenging known and unknown attack protocols. The results reveal interesting trends and can act as pointers for sensor selection for safety-critical presentation attack detection systems. The source codes and protocols to reproduce the results are made available publicly making it possible to extend this work to other architectures. 针对演示攻击的漏洞是破坏人脸识别系统广泛部署的一个关键问题。尽管演示攻击检测（PAD）系统试图解决这个问题，但缺乏通用性和鲁棒性仍然是一个主要问题。多项研究表明，使用多通道 PAD 系统可以缓解此漏洞并产生更强大的系统。然而，PAD 系统有多种通道可供选择，例如 RGB、近红外、短波红外、深度和热传感器。拥有大量传感器会增加系统成本，因此在选择模式时有必要了解不同传感器针对各种攻击的性能。在这项工作中，我们进行了一项全面的研究，以了解各种成像方式对 PAD 的有效性。这些研究是在多通道 PAD 数据集上进行的，该数据集考虑了广泛的 2D、3D 和部分攻击，通过 14 种不同的传感方式收集。我们使用基于多通道卷积网络的架构，该架构使用像素级二进制监督。该模型已在各种具有挑战性的已知和未知攻击协议上使用不同的通道组合和不同的图像质量进行了评估。结果揭示了有趣的趋势，可以作为安全关键型演示攻击检测系统的传感器选择指南。重现结果的源代码和协议已公开提供，从而可以将这项工作扩展到其他架构。 本文对多通道生物特征人脸识别防攻击检测系统进行了全面评估，研究不同传感器模态在对抗多种攻击时的有效性。 Anjith George,David Geissbuhler,Sebastien Marcel cs.CV

authors_text: Mikołaj Małkiński,Jacek Mańdziuk
title: A Review of Emerging Research Directions in Abstract Visual Reasoning
title_zh: 抽象视觉推理新兴研究方向综述
abstract: Abstract Visual Reasoning (AVR) problems are commonly used to approximate human intelligence. They test the ability of applying previously gained knowledge, experience and skills in a completely new setting, which makes them particularly well-suited for this task. Recently, the AVR problems have become popular as a proxy to study machine intelligence, which has led to emergence of new distinct types of problems and multiple benchmark sets. In this work we review this emerging AVR research and propose a taxonomy to categorise the AVR tasks along 5 dimensions: input shapes, hidden rules, target task, cognitive function, and main challenge. The perspective taken in this survey allows to characterise AVR problems with respect to their shared and distinct properties, provides a unified view on the existing approaches for solving AVR tasks, shows how the AVR problems relate to practical applications, and outlines promising directions for future work. One of them refers to the observation that in the machine learning literature different tasks are considered in isolation, which is in the stark contrast with the way the AVR tasks are used to measure human intelligence, where multiple types of problems are combined within a single IQ test.
summary: Abstract Visual Reasoning (AVR) problems are commonly used to approximate human intelligence. They test the ability of applying previously gained knowledge, experience and skills in a completely new setting, which makes them particularly well-suited for this task. Recently, the AVR problems have become popular as a proxy to study machine intelligence, which has led to emergence of new distinct types of problems and multiple benchmark sets. In this work we review this emerging AVR research and propose a taxonomy to categorise the AVR tasks along 5 dimensions: input shapes, hidden rules, target task, cognitive function, and main challenge. The perspective taken in this survey allows to characterise AVR problems with respect to their shared and distinct properties, provides a unified view on the existing approaches for solving AVR tasks, shows how the AVR problems relate to practical applications, and outlines promising directions for future work. One of them refers to the observation that in the machine learning literature different tasks are considered in isolation, which is in the stark contrast with the way the AVR tasks are used to measure human intelligence, where multiple types of problems are combined within a single IQ test.
abstract_zh: 摘要 视觉推理（AVR）问题通常用于近似人类智能。他们测试在全新的环境中应用先前获得的知识、经验和技能的能力，这使他们特别适合这项任务。最近，AVR 问题作为研究机器智能的代理变得流行，这导致了新的不同类型的问题和多个基准集的出现。在这项工作中，我们回顾了这一新兴的 AVR 研究，并提出了一种分类法，按照 5 个维度对 AVR 任务进行分类：输入形状、隐藏规则、目标任务、认知功能和主要挑战。本次调查所采取的观点可以描述 AVR 问题的共同和独特属性，提供解决 AVR 任务的现有方法的统一视图，展示 AVR 问题与实际应用的关系，并概述未来工作的有希望的方向。其中之一是指在机器学习文献中，不同的任务被孤立地考虑，这与 AVR 任务用于测量人类智力的方式形成鲜明对比，在 AVR 任务中，多种类型的问题被组合在一个 IQ 测试中。

AI.tldr: 本文回顾了抽象视觉推理（AVR）的新兴研究方向，并提出了一个基于五个维度的分类法，以系统化整理和分析AVR任务。
AI.motivation: 随着AVR成为研究机器智能的热门工具，现有研究缺乏系统分类，且任务孤立处理与人类智能测试方式存在差异，需统一视角进行分析。
AI.method: 通过提出一个包含输入形状、隐藏规则、目标任务、认知功能和主要挑战的五维分类框架，对AVR任务进行系统分类和分析。
AI.result: 该分类法为AVR任务提供了统一视角，梳理了现有方法，揭示了其与实际应用的联系，并指出了未来研究方向，如任务整合与跨任务学习。
AI.conclusion: 结论指出当前机器学习任务孤立研究的局限性，呼吁借鉴人类智能测试方式，推动跨任务整合与多维度挑战的解决。
