authors_text: Hironori Murase,Kenji Fukumizu
title: ALGAN: Anomaly Detection by Generating Pseudo Anomalous Data via Latent Variables
title_zh: ALGAN：通过潜在变量生成伪异常数据进行异常检测
abstract: In many anomaly detection tasks, where anomalous data rarely appear and are difficult to collect, training using only normal data is important. Although it is possible to manually create anomalous data using prior knowledge, they may be subject to user bias. In this paper, we propose an Anomalous Latent variable Generative Adversarial Network (ALGAN) in which the GAN generator produces pseudo-anomalous data as well as fake-normal data, whereas the discriminator is trained to distinguish between normal and pseudo-anomalous data. This differs from the standard GAN discriminator, which specializes in classifying two similar classes. The training dataset contains only normal data; the latent variables are introduced in anomalous states and are input into the generator to produce diverse pseudo-anomalous data. We compared the performance of ALGAN with other existing methods on the MVTec-AD, Magnetic Tile Defects, and COIL-100 datasets. The experimental results showed that ALGAN exhibited an AUROC comparable to those of state-of-the-art methods while achieving a much faster prediction time.
summary: In many anomaly detection tasks, where anomalous data rarely appear and are difficult to collect, training using only normal data is important. Although it is possible to manually create anomalous data using prior knowledge, they may be subject to user bias. In this paper, we propose an Anomalous Latent variable Generative Adversarial Network (ALGAN) in which the GAN generator produces pseudo-anomalous data as well as fake-normal data, whereas the discriminator is trained to distinguish between normal and pseudo-anomalous data. This differs from the standard GAN discriminator, which specializes in classifying two similar classes. The training dataset contains only normal data; the latent variables are introduced in anomalous states and are input into the generator to produce diverse pseudo-anomalous data. We compared the performance of ALGAN with other existing methods on the MVTec-AD, Magnetic Tile Defects, and COIL-100 datasets. The experimental results showed that ALGAN exhibited an AUROC comparable to those of state-of-the-art methods while achieving a much faster prediction time.
abstract_zh: 在许多异常检测任务中，异常数据很少出现且难以收集，因此仅使用正常数据进行训练非常重要。尽管可以使用先验知识手动创建异常数据，但它们可能会受到用户偏差的影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种异常潜变量生成对抗网络（ALGAN），其中 GAN 生成器生成伪异常数据和假正常数据，而鉴别器则经过训练以区分正常数据和伪异常数据。这与标准 GAN 判别器不同，标准 GAN 判别器专门对两个相似的类别进行分类。训练数据集仅包含正常数据；潜变量在异常状态下被引入并输入到生成器中以产生各种伪异常数据。我们在 MVTec-AD、Magnetic Tile Defects 和 COIL-100 数据集上比较了 ALGAN 与其他现有方法的性能。实验结果表明，ALGAN 的 AUROC 与最先进的方法相当，同时实现了更快的预测时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ALGAN的生成对抗网络，用于在仅有正常数据的情况下生成伪异常数据以实现异常检测。
AI.motivation: 在许多异常检测任务中，异常数据很少且难以收集，仅使用正常数据进行训练至关重要。然而，手动创建异常数据可能会受到用户偏见的影响。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种带有异常潜在变量的生成对抗网络（ALGAN），其中生成器生成伪异常数据和假正常数据，而判别器则用于区分正常数据和伪异常数据。
AI.result: 在MVTec-AD、磁性瓷砖缺陷和COIL-100数据集上的实验结果表明，ALGAN的AUROC与最先进的方法相当，同时预测时间更快。
AI.conclusion: ALGAN在仅使用正常数据的情况下，通过生成伪异常数据实现了高效的异常检测，并在多个数据集上表现出色。

search_text: ALGAN: Anomaly Detection by Generating Pseudo Anomalous Data via Latent Variables ALGAN：通过潜在变量生成伪异常数据进行异常检测 In many anomaly detection tasks, where anomalous data rarely appear and are difficult to collect, training using only normal data is important. Although it is possible to manually create anomalous data using prior knowledge, they may be subject to user bias. In this paper, we propose an Anomalous Latent variable Generative Adversarial Network (ALGAN) in which the GAN generator produces pseudo-anomalous data as well as fake-normal data, whereas the discriminator is trained to distinguish between normal and pseudo-anomalous data. This differs from the standard GAN discriminator, which specializes in classifying two similar classes. The training dataset contains only normal data; the latent variables are introduced in anomalous states and are input into the generator to produce diverse pseudo-anomalous data. We compared the performance of ALGAN with other existing methods on the MVTec-AD, Magnetic Tile Defects, and COIL-100 datasets. The experimental results showed that ALGAN exhibited an AUROC comparable to those of state-of-the-art methods while achieving a much faster prediction time. 在许多异常检测任务中，异常数据很少出现且难以收集，因此仅使用正常数据进行训练非常重要。尽管可以使用先验知识手动创建异常数据，但它们可能会受到用户偏差的影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种异常潜变量生成对抗网络（ALGAN），其中 GAN 生成器生成伪异常数据和假正常数据，而鉴别器则经过训练以区分正常数据和伪异常数据。这与标准 GAN 判别器不同，标准 GAN 判别器专门对两个相似的类别进行分类。训练数据集仅包含正常数据；潜变量在异常状态下被引入并输入到生成器中以产生各种伪异常数据。我们在 MVTec-AD、Magnetic Tile Defects 和 COIL-100 数据集上比较了 ALGAN 与其他现有方法的性能。实验结果表明，ALGAN 的 AUROC 与最先进的方法相当，同时实现了更快的预测时间。 本文提出了一种名为ALGAN的生成对抗网络，用于在仅有正常数据的情况下生成伪异常数据以实现异常检测。 Hironori Murase,Kenji Fukumizu cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Song-Ren Wang,Hong-Yang Shih,Zheng-Yi Shen,Wen-Kai Tai
title: End-to-End High Accuracy License Plate Recognition Based on Depthwise Separable Convolution Networks
title_zh: 基于深度可分离卷积网络的端到端高精度车牌识别
abstract: Automatic license plate recognition plays a crucial role in modern transportation systems such as for traffic monitoring and vehicle violation detection. In real-world scenarios, license plate recognition still faces many challenges and is impaired by unpredictable interference such as weather or lighting conditions. Many machine learning based ALPR solutions have been proposed to solve such challenges in recent years. However, most are not convincing, either because their results are evaluated on small or simple datasets that lack diverse surroundings, or because they require powerful hardware to achieve a reasonable frames-per-second in real-world applications. In this paper, we propose a novel segmentation-free framework for license plate recognition and introduce NP-ALPR, a diverse and challenging dataset which resembles real-world scenarios. The proposed network model consists of the latest deep learning methods and state-of-the-art ideas, and benefits from a novel network architecture. It achieves higher accuracy with lower computational requirements than previous works. We evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed method on three different datasets and show a recognition accuracy of over 99% and over 70 fps, demonstrating that our method is not only robust but also computationally efficient.
summary: Automatic license plate recognition plays a crucial role in modern transportation systems such as for traffic monitoring and vehicle violation detection. In real-world scenarios, license plate recognition still faces many challenges and is impaired by unpredictable interference such as weather or lighting conditions. Many machine learning based ALPR solutions have been proposed to solve such challenges in recent years. However, most are not convincing, either because their results are evaluated on small or simple datasets that lack diverse surroundings, or because they require powerful hardware to achieve a reasonable frames-per-second in real-world applications. In this paper, we propose a novel segmentation-free framework for license plate recognition and introduce NP-ALPR, a diverse and challenging dataset which resembles real-world scenarios. The proposed network model consists of the latest deep learning methods and state-of-the-art ideas, and benefits from a novel network architecture. It achieves higher accuracy with lower computational requirements than previous works. We evaluate the effectiveness of the proposed method on three different datasets and show a recognition accuracy of over 99% and over 70 fps, demonstrating that our method is not only robust but also computationally efficient.
abstract_zh: 自动车牌识别在现代交通系统中发挥着至关重要的作用，例如交通监控和车辆违规检测。在现实场景中，车牌识别仍然面临许多挑战，并且会受到天气或照明条件等不可预测的干扰的影响。近年来，人们提出了许多基于机器学习的 ALPR 解决方案来解决此类挑战。然而，大多数方法并不令人信服，要么是因为它们的结果是在缺乏多样化环境的小型或简单数据集上评估的，要么是因为它们需要强大的硬件才能在实际应用中实现合理的每秒帧数。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于车牌识别的新颖的无分割框架，并介绍了 NP-ALPR，这是一个类似于现实世界场景的多样化且具有挑战性的数据集。所提出的网络模型由最新的深度学习方法和最先进的思想组成，并受益于新颖的网络架构。与以前的作品相比，它以更低的计算要求实现了更高的精度。我们在三个不同的数据集上评估了所提出方法的有效性，并显示识别精度超过 99% 和超过 70 fps，这表明我们的方法不仅稳健，而且计算效率高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度可分离卷积网络的端到端高精度车牌识别方法。
AI.motivation: 现有车牌识别方法在真实场景中受天气、光照等因素影响较大，且多数方案依赖小数据集或需要强大硬件支持。
AI.method: 设计了无需分割的框架，结合深度可分离卷积网络与新型架构，并构建了模拟真实场景的NP-ALPR数据集。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上实现99%+识别准确率与70+fps处理速度，验证了方法的鲁棒性与计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持高精度的同时显著降低计算需求，为实际交通监控场景提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Miguel A. Ramirez,Song-Kyoo Kim,Hussam Al Hamadi,Ernesto Damiani,Young-Ji Byon,Tae-Yeon Kim,Chung-Suk Cho,Chan Yeob Yeun
title: Poisoning Attacks and Defenses on Artificial Intelligence: A Survey
title_zh: 人工智能的中毒攻击和防御：一项调查
abstract: Machine learning models have been widely adopted in several fields. However, most recent studies have shown several vulnerabilities from attacks with a potential to jeopardize the integrity of the model, presenting a new window of research opportunity in terms of cyber-security. This survey is conducted with a main intention of highlighting the most relevant information related to security vulnerabilities in the context of machine learning (ML) classifiers; more specifically, directed towards training procedures against data poisoning attacks, representing a type of attack that consists of tampering the data samples fed to the model during the training phase, leading to a degradation in the models accuracy during the inference phase. This work compiles the most relevant insights and findings found in the latest existing literatures addressing this type of attacks. Moreover, this paper also covers several defense techniques that promise feasible detection and mitigation mechanisms, capable of conferring a certain level of robustness to a target model against an attacker. A thorough assessment is performed on the reviewed works, comparing the effects of data poisoning on a wide range of ML models in real-world conditions, performing quantitative and qualitative analyses. This paper analyzes the main characteristics for each approach including performance success metrics, required hyperparameters, and deployment complexity. Moreover, this paper emphasizes the underlying assumptions and limitations considered by both attackers and defenders along with their intrinsic properties such as: availability, reliability, privacy, accountability, interpretability, etc. Finally, this paper concludes by making references of some of main existing research trends that provide pathways towards future research directions in the field of cyber-security.

abstract_zh: 机器学习模型已在多个领域得到广泛采用。然而，最近的研究表明，攻击存在多个漏洞，可能会危及模型的完整性，这为网络安全方面的研究机会提供了新的窗口。进行这项调查的主要目的是突出与机器学习 (ML) 分类器背景下的安全漏洞相关的最相关信息；更具体地说，针对针对数据中毒攻击的训练程序，代表一种攻击类型，包括在训练阶段篡改输入模型的数据样本，导致推理阶段模型准确性下降。这项工作汇集了解决此类攻击的最新现有文献中最相关的见解和发现。此外，本文还涵盖了几种防御技术，这些技术有望提供可行的检测和缓解机制，能够为目标模型赋予针对攻击者的一定程度的鲁棒性。对所审查的作品进行了全面的评估，比较了数据中毒对现实条件下各种机器学习模型的影响，并进行了定量和定性分析。本文分析了每种方法的主要特征，包括性能成功指标、所需的超参数和部署复杂性。此外，本文强调了攻击者和防御者所考虑的基本假设和局限性及其内在属性，例如：可用性、可靠性、隐私性、责任性、可解释性等。最后，本文通过参考一些现有的主要研究趋势来得出结论，这些趋势为网络安全领域的未来研究方向提供了途径。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了人工智能中的投毒攻击与防御方法，重点分析训练阶段数据投毒攻击的机制及防御策略。
AI.motivation: 机器学习模型在多个领域广泛应用，但其训练阶段易受数据投毒攻击影响，威胁模型完整性，亟需系统性研究安全漏洞与防御方案。
AI.method: 通过文献调研总结攻击与防御技术，比较不同机器学习模型在真实场景下的攻击效果，分析防御方法的性能指标、参数需求及部署复杂度。
AI.result: 梳理了数据投毒攻击的核心特征及防御机制，评估了多种防御方法的有效性，并探讨了攻击与防御的假设条件、隐私性、可解释性等内在限制。
AI.conclusion: 未来需进一步研究鲁棒性更强的防御技术，并结合可用性、可靠性等维度推动人工智能安全领域的发展。

conclusion: 未来需进一步研究鲁棒性更强的防御技术，并结合可用性、可靠性等维度推动人工智能安全领域的发展。
search_text: Poisoning Attacks and Defenses on Artificial Intelligence: A Survey 人工智能的中毒攻击和防御：一项调查 Machine learning models have been widely adopted in several fields. However, most recent studies have shown several vulnerabilities from attacks with a potential to jeopardize the integrity of the model, presenting a new window of research opportunity in terms of cyber-security. This survey is conducted with a main intention of highlighting the most relevant information related to security vulnerabilities in the context of machine learning (ML) classifiers; more specifically, directed towards training procedures against data poisoning attacks, representing a type of attack that consists of tampering the data samples fed to the model during the training phase, leading to a degradation in the models accuracy during the inference phase. This work compiles the most relevant insights and findings found in the latest existing literatures addressing this type of attacks. Moreover, this paper also covers several defense techniques that promise feasible detection and mitigation mechanisms, capable of conferring a certain level of robustness to a target model against an attacker. A thorough assessment is performed on the reviewed works, comparing the effects of data poisoning on a wide range of ML models in real-world conditions, performing quantitative and qualitative analyses. This paper analyzes the main characteristics for each approach including performance success metrics, required hyperparameters, and deployment complexity. Moreover, this paper emphasizes the underlying assumptions and limitations considered by both attackers and defenders along with their intrinsic properties such as: availability, reliability, privacy, accountability, interpretability, etc. Finally, this paper concludes by making references of some of main existing research trends that provide pathways towards future research directions in the field of cyber-security. 机器学习模型已在多个领域得到广泛采用。然而，最近的研究表明，攻击存在多个漏洞，可能会危及模型的完整性，这为网络安全方面的研究机会提供了新的窗口。进行这项调查的主要目的是突出与机器学习 (ML) 分类器背景下的安全漏洞相关的最相关信息；更具体地说，针对针对数据中毒攻击的训练程序，代表一种攻击类型，包括在训练阶段篡改输入模型的数据样本，导致推理阶段模型准确性下降。这项工作汇集了解决此类攻击的最新现有文献中最相关的见解和发现。此外，本文还涵盖了几种防御技术，这些技术有望提供可行的检测和缓解机制，能够为目标模型赋予针对攻击者的一定程度的鲁棒性。对所审查的作品进行了全面的评估，比较了数据中毒对现实条件下各种机器学习模型的影响，并进行了定量和定性分析。本文分析了每种方法的主要特征，包括性能成功指标、所需的超参数和部署复杂性。此外，本文强调了攻击者和防御者所考虑的基本假设和局限性及其内在属性，例如：可用性、可靠性、隐私性、责任性、可解释性等。最后，本文通过参考一些现有的主要研究趋势来得出结论，这些趋势为网络安全领域的未来研究方向提供了途径。 本文综述了人工智能中的投毒攻击与防御方法，重点分析训练阶段数据投毒攻击的机制及防御策略。 Miguel A. Ramirez,Song-Kyoo Kim,Hussam Al Hamadi,Ernesto Damiani,Young-Ji Byon,Tae-Yeon Kim,Chung-Suk Cho,Chan Yeob Yeun cs.CR,cs.AI

authors_text: Ed Pizzi,Sreya Dutta Roy,Sugosh Nagavara Ravindra,Priya Goyal,Matthijs Douze
title: A Self-Supervised Descriptor for Image Copy Detection
title_zh: 用于图像副本检测的自监督描述符
abstract: Image copy detection is an important task for content moderation. We introduce SSCD, a model that builds on a recent self-supervised contrastive training objective. We adapt this method to the copy detection task by changing the architecture and training objective, including a pooling operator from the instance matching literature, and adapting contrastive learning to augmentations that combine images. Our approach relies on an entropy regularization term, promoting consistent separation between descriptor vectors, and we demonstrate that this significantly improves copy detection accuracy. Our method produces a compact descriptor vector, suitable for real-world web scale applications. Statistical information from a background image distribution can be incorporated into the descriptor. On the recent DISC2021 benchmark, SSCD is shown to outperform both baseline copy detection models and self-supervised architectures designed for image classification by huge margins, in all settings. For example, SSCD out-performs SimCLR descriptors by 48% absolute. Code is available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/sscd-copy-detection.
summary: Image copy detection is an important task for content moderation. We introduce SSCD, a model that builds on a recent self-supervised contrastive training objective. We adapt this method to the copy detection task by changing the architecture and training objective, including a pooling operator from the instance matching literature, and adapting contrastive learning to augmentations that combine images. Our approach relies on an entropy regularization term, promoting consistent separation between descriptor vectors, and we demonstrate that this significantly improves copy detection accuracy. Our method produces a compact descriptor vector, suitable for real-world web scale applications. Statistical information from a background image distribution can be incorporated into the descriptor. On the recent DISC2021 benchmark, SSCD is shown to outperform both baseline copy detection models and self-supervised architectures designed for image classification by huge margins, in all settings. For example, SSCD out-performs SimCLR descriptors by 48% absolute. Code is available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/sscd-copy-detection.
abstract_zh: 图像副本检测是内容审核的一项重要任务。我们介绍 SSCD，这是一个基于最近的自我监督对比训练目标的模型。我们通过改变架构和训练目标（包括实例匹配文献中的池化算子）以及将对比学习应用于组合图像的增强来使这种方法适应复制检测任务。我们的方法依赖于熵正则化项，促进描述符向量之间的一致分离，并且我们证明这显着提高了副本检测的准确性。我们的方法产生一个紧凑的描述符向量，适用于现实世界的网络规模应用。来自背景图像分布的统计信息可以并入描述符中。在最近的 DISC2021 基准测试中，SSCD 在所有设置下都远远优于基线复制检测模型和专为图像分类而设计的自监督架构。例如，SSCD 的性能绝对优于 SimCLR 描述符 48%。代码可在 https://github.com/facebookresearch/sscd-copy-detection 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督对比学习的图像复制检测模型SSCD，通过改进架构和训练目标实现高效检测。
AI.motivation: 现有图像复制检测方法在准确率和可扩展性上存在不足，需设计更适应实际应用场景的紧凑型描述符以提升检测性能。
AI.method: 结合实例匹配领域的池化算子，改进对比学习目标函数并引入熵正则化项，通过图像增强策略优化描述符向量分离度。
AI.result: 在DISC2021基准测试中，SSCD相较SimCLR等基线模型绝对准确率提升48%，且支持大规模网络应用。
AI.conclusion: SSCD通过自监督学习与熵正则化结合，在保持描述符紧凑性的同时显著提升图像复制检测效果，验证了方法在实际场景中的有效性。

We introduce SSCD, a model that builds on a recent self-supervised contrastive training objective. We adapt this method to the copy detection task by changing the architecture and training objective, including a pooling operator from the instance matching literature, and adapting contrastive learning to augmentations that combine images. Our approach relies on an entropy regularization term, promoting consistent separation between descriptor vectors, and we demonstrate that this significantly improves copy detection accuracy. Our method produces a compact descriptor vector, suitable for real-world web scale applications. Statistical information from a background image distribution can be incorporated into the descriptor. On the recent DISC2021 benchmark, SSCD is shown to outperform both baseline copy detection models and self-supervised architectures designed for image classification by huge margins, in all settings. For example, SSCD out-performs SimCLR descriptors by 48% absolute. authors_text: Hans-Joachim Böckenhauer,Fabian Frei,Silvan Horvath
title: Priority Algorithms with Advice for Disjoint Path Allocation Problems
title_zh: 优先级算法以及针对不相交路径分配问题的建议
abstract: We analyze the Disjoint Path Allocation problem (DPA) in the priority framework. Motivated by the problem of traffic regulation in communication networks, DPA consists of allocating edge-disjoint paths in a graph. While online algorithms for DPA have been thoroughly studied in the past, we extend the analysis of this optimization problem by considering the more powerful class of priority algorithms. Like an online algorithm, a priority algorithm receives its input only sequentially and must output irrevocable decisions for individual input items before having seen the input in its entirety. However, in contrast to the online setting, a priority algorithm may choose an order on the set of all possible input items and the actual input is then presented according to this order. A priority algorithm is a natural model for the intuitively well-understood concept of a greedy algorithm. Apart from analyzing the classical priority setting, we also consider priority algorithms with advice. Originally conceived to study online algorithms from an information-theoretic point of view, the concept of advice has recently been extended to the priority framework. In this paper, we analyze the classical variant of the DPA problem on the graph class of paths, the related problem of Length-Weighted DPA, and finally, DPA on the graph class of trees. We show asymptotically matching upper and lower bounds on the advice necessary for optimality in LWDPA and generalize the known optimality result for DPA on paths to trees with maximal degree at most 3. On trees with maximal degree greater than 3, we prove matching upper and lower bounds on the approximation ratio in the advice-free priority setting. Finally, we present upper and lower bounds on the advice necessary to achieve optimality on such trees.
summary: We analyze the Disjoint Path Allocation problem (DPA) in the priority framework. Motivated by the problem of traffic regulation in communication networks, DPA consists of allocating edge-disjoint paths in a graph. While online algorithms for DPA have been thoroughly studied in the past, we extend the analysis of this optimization problem by considering the more powerful class of priority algorithms. Like an online algorithm, a priority algorithm receives its input only sequentially and must output irrevocable decisions for individual input items before having seen the input in its entirety. However, in contrast to the online setting, a priority algorithm may choose an order on the set of all possible input items and the actual input is then presented according to this order. A priority algorithm is a natural model for the intuitively well-understood concept of a greedy algorithm. Apart from analyzing the classical priority setting, we also consider priority algorithms with advice. Originally conceived to study online algorithms from an information-theoretic point of view, the concept of advice has recently been extended to the priority framework. In this paper, we analyze the classical variant of the DPA problem on the graph class of paths, the related problem of Length-Weighted DPA, and finally, DPA on the graph class of trees. We show asymptotically matching upper and lower bounds on the advice necessary for optimality in LWDPA and generalize the known optimality result for DPA on paths to trees with maximal degree at most 3. On trees with maximal degree greater than 3, we prove matching upper and lower bounds on the approximation ratio in the advice-free priority setting. Finally, we present upper and lower bounds on the advice necessary to achieve optimality on such trees.
abstract_zh: 我们分析了优先级框架中的不相交路径分配问题（DPA）。受通信网络中流量调节问题的推动，DPA 包括在图中分配边不相交的路径。虽然过去已经对 DPA 的在线算法进行了深入研究，但我们通过考虑更强大的优先级算法类别来扩展此优化问题的分析。与在线算法一样，优先级算法仅按顺序接收其输入，并且必须在看到完整的输入之前针对各个输入项输出不可撤销的决策。然而，与在线设置相反，优先级算法可以在所有可能的输入项的集合上选择顺序，然后根据该顺序呈现实际输入。优先级算法是直观上易于理解的贪婪算法概念的自然模型。除了分析经典的优先级设置之外，我们还考虑带有建议的优先级算法。建议的概念最初是从信息论的角度研究在线算法，最近已扩展到优先级框架。在本文中，我们分析了路径图类上的 DPA 问题的经典变体、长度加权 DPA 的相关问题，最后分析了树图类上的 DPA。我们展示了 LWDPA 中最优性所需建议的渐近匹配上限和下界，并将 DPA 的已知最优性结果推广到最大度数最多为 3 的树上。在最大度数大于 3 的树上，我们证明了在无建议优先级设置中近似比的上下限匹配。最后，我们提出了在此类树上实现最优所需的建议的上限和下限。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了在优先算法框架下带有建议信息的不相交路径分配问题（DPA），研究其在不同图类中的最优性及近似比界。
AI.motivation: 受通信网络中流量调节问题的启发，传统在线算法难以处理动态输入，需通过优先算法与建议机制提升路径分配效率。
AI.method: 在优先算法模型中引入建议信息，分析路径图、长度加权DPA及树图类问题，结合信息论方法推导上下界。
AI.result: 在长度加权DPA中确定最优性所需建议的渐近界，将路径图的最优性结果推广至最大度≤3的树，并给出高阶树的近似比界。
AI.conclusion: 优先算法与建议机制为DPA提供了新的分析视角，揭示了不同图结构下最优解与近似解的复杂性边界。

Finally, we present upper and lower bounds on the advice necessary to achieve optimality on such trees. 我们分析了优先级框架中的不相交路径分配问题（DPA）。受通信网络中流量调节问题的推动，DPA 包括在图中分配边不相交的路径。虽然过去已经对 DPA 的在线算法进行了深入研究，但我们通过考虑更强大的优先级算法类别来扩展此优化问题的分析。与在线算法一样，优先级算法仅按顺序接收其输入，并且必须在看到完整的输入之前针对各个输入项输出不可撤销的决策。然而，与在线设置相反，优先级算法可以在所有可能的输入项的集合上选择顺序，然后根据该顺序呈现实际输入。优先级算法是直观上易于理解的贪婪算法概念的自然模型。除了分析经典的优先级设置之外，我们还考虑带有建议的优先级算法。建议的概念最初是从信息论的角度研究在线算法，最近已扩展到优先级框架。在本文中，我们分析了路径图类上的 DPA 问题的经典变体、长度加权 DPA 的相关问题，最后分析了树图类上的 DPA。我们展示了 LWDPA 中最优性所需建议的渐近匹配上限和下界，并将 DPA 的已知最优性结果推广到最大度数最多为 3 的树上。在最大度数大于 3 的树上，我们证明了在无建议优先级设置中近似比的上下限匹配。最后，我们提出了在此类树上实现最优所需的建议的上限和下限。 本文分析了在优先算法框架下带有建议信息的不相交路径分配问题（DPA），研究其在不同图类中的最优性及近似比界。 Hans-Joachim Böckenhauer,Fabian Frei,Silvan Horvath cs.DS,cs.CC

authors_text: Xingye Chen,Yiqi Wu,Wenjie Xu,Jin Li,Huaiyi Dong,Yilin Chen
title: PointSCNet: Point Cloud Structure and Correlation Learning Based on Space Filling Curve-Guided Sampling
title_zh: PointSCNet：基于空间填充曲线引导采样的点云结构和相关性学习
abstract: Geometrical structures and the internal local region relationship, such as symmetry, regular array, junction, etc., are essential for understanding a 3D shape. This paper proposes a point cloud feature extraction network named PointSCNet, to capture the geometrical structure information and local region correlation information of a point cloud. The PointSCNet consists of three main modules: the space-filling curve-guided sampling module, the information fusion module, and the channel-spatial attention module. The space-filling curve-guided sampling module uses Z-order curve coding to sample points that contain geometrical correlation. The information fusion module uses a correlation tensor and a set of skip connections to fuse the structure and correlation information. The channel-spatial attention module enhances the representation of key points and crucial feature channels to refine the network. The proposed PointSCNet is evaluated on shape classification and part segmentation tasks. The experimental results demonstrate that the PointSCNet outperforms or is on par with state-of-the-art methods by learning the structure and correlation of point clouds effectively.
summary: Geometrical structures and the internal local region relationship, such as symmetry, regular array, junction, etc., are essential for understanding a 3D shape. This paper proposes a point cloud feature extraction network named PointSCNet, to capture the geometrical structure information and local region correlation information of a point cloud. The PointSCNet consists of three main modules: the space-filling curve-guided sampling module, the information fusion module, and the channel-spatial attention module. The space-filling curve-guided sampling module uses Z-order curve coding to sample points that contain geometrical correlation. The information fusion module uses a correlation tensor and a set of skip connections to fuse the structure and correlation information. The channel-spatial attention module enhances the representation of key points and crucial feature channels to refine the network. The proposed PointSCNet is evaluated on shape classification and part segmentation tasks. The experimental results demonstrate that the PointSCNet outperforms or is on par with state-of-the-art methods by learning the structure and correlation of point clouds effectively.
abstract_zh: 几何结构和内部局部区域关系，例如对称性、规则阵列、结点等，对于理解 3D 形状至关重要。本文提出了一种名为PointSCNet的点云特征提取网络，用于捕获点云的几何结构信息和局部区域相关信息。 PointSCNet由三个主要模块组成：空间填充曲线引导采样模块、信息融合模块和通道空间注意力模块。空间填充曲线引导采样模块使用Z阶曲线编码对包含几何相关性的点进行采样。信息融合模块使用相关张量和一组跳跃连接来融合结构和相关信息。通道空间注意力模块增强了关键点和关键特征通道的表示，以细化网络。所提出的 PointSCNet 在形状分类和零件分割任务上进行评估。实验结果表明，PointSCNet 通过有效学习点云的结构和相关性，性能优于或与最先进的方法相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PointSCNet网络，通过空间填充曲线引导采样、信息融合和通道-空间注意力模块，学习点云的几何结构和局部区域关联信息，用于3D形状理解任务。
AI.motivation: 几何结构和局部区域关系（如对称性、规则阵列等）对3D形状理解至关重要，但现有方法难以有效捕捉点云的结构信息和局部关联。
AI.method: PointSCNet包含三个模块：1) 空间填充曲线（Z-order曲线）引导采样模块，提取几何相关点；2) 信息融合模块，通过相关张量和跳跃连接融合结构与关联信息；3) 通道-空间注意力模块，增强关键点和特征通道的表示。
AI.result: 在形状分类和部件分割任务中，PointSCNet性能优于或与最先进方法相当，验证了其对点云结构和关联信息的有效学习能力。
AI.conclusion: PointSCNet通过结构化采样与多模块协同，有效捕捉点云几何特征和局部关联，为3D形状理解提供了新方法。

authors_text: Zhu Wang,Honglong Chen,Zhe Li,Kai Lin,Nan Jiang,Feng Xia
title: VRConvMF: Visual Recurrent Convolutional Matrix Factorization for Movie Recommendation
title_zh: VRConvMF：用于电影推荐的视觉循环卷积矩阵分解
abstract: Sparsity of user-to-item rating data becomes one of challenging issues in the recommender systems, which severely deteriorates the recommendation performance. Fortunately, context-aware recommender systems can alleviate the sparsity problem by making use of some auxiliary information, such as the information of both the users and items. In particular, the visual information of items, such as the movie poster, can be considered as the supplement for item description documents, which helps to obtain more item features. In this paper, we focus on movie recommender system and propose a probabilistic matrix factorization based recommendation scheme called visual recurrent convolutional matrix factorization (VRConvMF), which utilizes the textual and multi-level visual features extracted from the descriptive texts and posters respectively. We implement the proposed VRConvMF and conduct extensive experiments on three commonly used real world datasets to validate its effectiveness. The experimental results illustrate that the proposed VRConvMF outperforms the existing schemes.
summary: Sparsity of user-to-item rating data becomes one of challenging issues in the recommender systems, which severely deteriorates the recommendation performance. Fortunately, context-aware recommender systems can alleviate the sparsity problem by making use of some auxiliary information, such as the information of both the users and items. In particular, the visual information of items, such as the movie poster, can be considered as the supplement for item description documents, which helps to obtain more item features. In this paper, we focus on movie recommender system and propose a probabilistic matrix factorization based recommendation scheme called visual recurrent convolutional matrix factorization (VRConvMF), which utilizes the textual and multi-level visual features extracted from the descriptive texts and posters respectively. We implement the proposed VRConvMF and conduct extensive experiments on three commonly used real world datasets to validate its effectiveness. The experimental results illustrate that the proposed VRConvMF outperforms the existing schemes.
abstract_zh: 用户对项目评分数据的稀疏性成为推荐系统中具有挑战性的问题之一，这严重恶化了推荐性能。幸运的是，上下文感知推荐系统可以通过利用一些辅助信息（例如用户和项目的信息）来缓解稀疏性问题。特别是，物品的视觉信息，例如电影海报，可以被认为是物品描述文档的补充，有助于获得更多的物品特征。在本文中，我们专注于电影推荐系统，提出了一种基于概率矩阵分解的推荐方案，称为视觉循环卷积矩阵分解（VRConvMF），该方案利用分别从描述性文本和海报中提取的文本和多级视觉特征。我们实现了所提出的 VRConvMF 并在三个常用的现实世界数据集上进行了广泛的实验以验证其有效性。实验结果表明，所提出的 VRConvMF 优于现有方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合视觉和文本特征的电影推荐方法VRConvMF，用于解决推荐系统中用户-物品评分数据稀疏性问题。
AI.motivation: 用户-物品评分数据的稀疏性严重影响推荐效果，而利用物品的视觉信息（如电影海报）和文本信息可补充特征描述，从而提升推荐性能。
AI.method: 基于概率矩阵分解框架，提出VRConvMF方法，通过卷积网络提取电影海报的多级视觉特征，并结合文本描述特征，利用循环结构建模用户偏好。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上的实验表明，VRConvMF在推荐准确率上优于现有主流推荐方法。
AI.conclusion: 融合多模态特征（视觉+文本）的VRConvMF能有效缓解数据稀疏性问题，显著提升电影推荐效果。

authors_text: Qingsong Zhao,Yi Wang,Zhipeng Zhou,Duoqian Miao,Limin Wang,Yu Qiao,Cairong Zhao
title: Rethinking the Zigzag Flattening for Image Reading
title_zh: 重新思考图像读取的锯齿形扁平化
comment: Modify the title, and introduce more innovative content
comments: Modify the title, and introduce more innovative content
abstract: Sequence ordering of word vector matters a lot to text reading, which has been proven in natural language processing (NLP). However, the rule of different sequence ordering in computer vision (CV) was not well explored, e.g., why the ``zigzag" flattening (ZF) is commonly utilized as a default option to get the image patches ordering in vision networks. Notably, when decomposing multi-scale images, the ZF could not maintain the invariance of feature point positions. To this end, we investigate the Hilbert fractal flattening (HF) as another method for sequence ordering in CV and contrast it against ZF. The HF has proven to be superior to other curves in maintaining spatial locality, when performing multi-scale transformations of dimensional space. And it can be easily plugged into most deep neural networks (DNNs). Extensive experiments demonstrate that it can yield consistent and significant performance boosts for a variety of architectures. Finally, we hope that our studies spark further research about the flattening strategy of image reading.
summary: Sequence ordering of word vector matters a lot to text reading, which has been proven in natural language processing (NLP). However, the rule of different sequence ordering in computer vision (CV) was not well explored, e.g., why the ``zigzag" flattening (ZF) is commonly utilized as a default option to get the image patches ordering in vision networks. Notably, when decomposing multi-scale images, the ZF could not maintain the invariance of feature point positions. To this end, we investigate the Hilbert fractal flattening (HF) as another method for sequence ordering in CV and contrast it against ZF. The HF has proven to be superior to other curves in maintaining spatial locality, when performing multi-scale transformations of dimensional space. And it can be easily plugged into most deep neural networks (DNNs). Extensive experiments demonstrate that it can yield consistent and significant performance boosts for a variety of architectures. Finally, we hope that our studies spark further research about the flattening strategy of image reading.
abstract_zh: 词向量的顺序对文本阅读非常重要，这已经在自然语言处理（NLP）中得到了证明。然而，计算机视觉（CV）中不同序列排序的规则尚未得到很好的探索，例如，为什么“之字形”扁平化（ZF）通常被用作视觉网络中图像块排序的默认选项。值得注意的是，在分解多尺度图像时，ZF无法保持特征点位置的不变性。为此，我们研究了希尔伯特分形扁平化（HF）作为CV和对比度中序列排序的另一种方法在执行维度空间的多尺度变换时，HF 已被证明优于其他曲线，并且可以轻松插入到大多数深度神经网络（DNN）中。最后，我们希望我们的研究能够激发关于图像读取的扁平化策略的进一步研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种替代传统锯齿状展开（ZF）的图像读取方法——希尔伯特分形展开（HF），以解决多尺度图像处理中特征点位置不变性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统锯齿状展开在多尺度图像分解时无法保持特征点位置不变性，而计算机视觉领域对序列排序规则的研究不足，需探索更优的图像块排列策略。
AI.method: 通过对比实验验证希尔伯特分形展开（HF）在保持空间局部性方面的优势，并将其集成到多种深度神经网络架构中进行性能测试。
AI.result: 实验表明，HF方法在多种网络结构中均能带来显著且一致的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: HF分形展开策略优于传统ZF方法，为图像读取的展开策略研究提供了新方向。

search_text: Rethinking the Zigzag Flattening for Image Reading 重新思考图像读取的锯齿形扁平化 Sequence ordering of word vector matters a lot to text reading, which has been proven in natural language processing (NLP). However, the rule of different sequence ordering in computer vision (CV) was not well explored, e.g., why the ``zigzag" flattening (ZF) is commonly utilized as a default option to get the image patches ordering in vision networks. Notably, when decomposing multi-scale images, the ZF could not maintain the invariance of feature point positions. To this end, we investigate the Hilbert fractal flattening (HF) as another method for sequence ordering in CV and contrast it against ZF. The HF has proven to be superior to other curves in maintaining spatial locality, when performing multi-scale transformations of dimensional space. And it can be easily plugged into most deep neural networks (DNNs). Extensive experiments demonstrate that it can yield consistent and significant performance boosts for a variety of architectures. Finally, we hope that our studies spark further research about the flattening strategy of image reading. 词向量的顺序对文本阅读非常重要，这已经在自然语言处理（NLP）中得到了证明。然而，计算机视觉（CV）中不同序列排序的规则尚未得到很好的探索，例如，为什么“之字形”扁平化（ZF）通常被用作视觉网络中图像块排序的默认选项。值得注意的是，在分解多尺度图像时，ZF无法保持特征点位置的不变性。为此，我们研究了希尔伯特分形扁平化（HF）作为CV和对比度中序列排序的另一种方法在执行维度空间的多尺度变换时，HF 已被证明优于其他曲线，并且可以轻松插入到大多数深度神经网络（DNN）中。最后，我们希望我们的研究能够激发关于图像读取的扁平化策略的进一步研究。 本文提出了一种替代传统锯齿状展开（ZF）的图像读取方法——希尔伯特分形展开（HF），以解决多尺度图像处理中特征点位置不变性问题。 Qingsong Zhao,Yi Wang,Zhipeng Zhou,Duoqian Miao,Limin Wang,Yu Qiao,Cairong Zhao cs.CV
